local Maid = {}
Maid.__index = Maid

function Maid.new()
	return setmetatable({
		_tasks = {},
	}, Maid)
end

function Maid:Give(taskItem)
	table.insert(self._tasks, taskItem)
	return taskItem
end

function Maid:Clean()
	for _, taskItem in ipairs(self._tasks) do
		if typeof(taskItem) == "RBXScriptConnection" then
			taskItem:Disconnect()
		elseif type(taskItem) == "function" then
			taskItem()
		elseif typeof(taskItem) == "Instance" then
			taskItem:Destroy()
		elseif type(taskItem) == "table" and taskItem.Destroy then
			taskItem:Destroy()
		end
	end
	table.clear(self._tasks)
end

function Maid:Destroy()
	self:Clean()
end

return Maid

local TableUtil = {}

function TableUtil.shallowCopy(source)
	local copy = {}
	for key, value in pairs(source or {}) do
		copy[key] = value
	end
	return copy
end

function TableUtil.deepCopy(source)
	if type(source) ~= "table" then
		return source
	end

	local copy = {}
	for key, value in pairs(source) do
		copy[TableUtil.deepCopy(key)] = TableUtil.deepCopy(value)
	end
	return copy
end

function TableUtil.merge(base, override)
	local merged = TableUtil.shallowCopy(base)
	for key, value in pairs(override or {}) do
		merged[key] = value
	end
	return merged
end

return TableUtil

local RateLimiter = {}
RateLimiter.__index = RateLimiter

function RateLimiter.new(options)
	options = options or {}

	return setmetatable({
		_capacity = options.capacity or 12,
		_refillPerSecond = options.refillPerSecond or 6,
		_buckets = {},
	}, RateLimiter)
end

function RateLimiter:_bucket(key)
	local now = os.clock()
	local bucket = self._buckets[key]

	if not bucket then
		bucket = {
			tokens = self._capacity,
			updatedAt = now,
			denied = 0,
		}
		self._buckets[key] = bucket
		return bucket
	end

	local elapsed = math.max(0, now - bucket.updatedAt)
	bucket.updatedAt = now
	bucket.tokens = math.min(self._capacity, bucket.tokens + elapsed * self._refillPerSecond)
	return bucket
end

function RateLimiter:Allow(key, cost)
	cost = cost or 1

	local bucket = self:_bucket(key)
	if bucket.tokens >= cost then
		bucket.tokens -= cost
		return true, bucket.tokens, bucket.denied
	end

	bucket.denied += 1
	return false, bucket.tokens, bucket.denied
end

function RateLimiter:Clear(key)
	self._buckets[key] = nil
end

return RateLimiter

local function findFrom(root, dottedPath)
	local current = root
	for segment in string.gmatch(dottedPath, "[^.]+") do
		current = current and current:FindFirstChild(segment)
	end
	return current
end

local function warnMissing(rootName, root, paths)
	for _, path in ipairs(paths) do
		if not findFrom(root, path) then
			warn(("[Aniverse Royale] Missing %s.%s. Apply blueprints/ar003/ar003_3v3_arena.blueprint.json."):format(rootName, path))
		end
	end
end

local function tagChildren(folder, tagName)
	if not folder then
		return
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(folder:GetChildren()) do
		CollectionService:AddTag(child, tagName)
	end
end

local function tagContractInstances()
	local worldRoot = Workspace:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.RootName)
	local dojo = worldRoot and worldRoot:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.TrainingDojoName)
	local arena = worldRoot and worldRoot:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.Arena3v3Name)
	if dojo then
		tagChildren(dojo:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.DummyFolderName), GameConstants.World.Tags.DamageDummy)
		tagChildren(dojo:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.CharacterPadFolderName), GameConstants.World.Tags.CharacterPad)
		tagChildren(dojo:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.MovementCourseName), GameConstants.World.Tags.MovementGate)
		tagChildren(dojo:FindFirstChild("Signs"), GameConstants.World.Tags.TrainingSign)
	end

	if arena then
		CollectionService:AddTag(arena, GameConstants.World.Tags.Arena3v3)
		tagChildren(arena:FindFirstChild("TeamPads"), GameConstants.World.Tags.TeamPad)
		tagChildren(arena:FindFirstChild("SunSpawnPoints"), GameConstants.World.Tags.ArenaSpawn)
		tagChildren(arena:FindFirstChild("MoonSpawnPoints"), GameConstants.World.Tags.ArenaSpawn)
		tagChildren(arena:FindFirstChild("BotSpawnPoints"), GameConstants.World.Tags.ArenaBotSpawn)
		tagChildren(arena:FindFirstChild("ArenaBoundaries"), GameConstants.World.Tags.ArenaBoundary)
		tagChildren(arena:FindFirstChild("ArenaBots"), GameConstants.World.Tags.ArenaBot)

		local startPad = arena:FindFirstChild("StartRoundPad")
		if startPad then
			CollectionService:AddTag(startPad, GameConstants.World.Tags.ArenaStartPad)
		end
	end
end

function WorldBuilderService.Start()
	warnMissing("Workspace", Workspace, requiredWorkspacePaths)
	warnMissing("StarterGui", StarterGui, requiredStarterGuiPaths)
	tagContractInstances()
end

return WorldBuilderService

local CollectionService = game:GetService("CollectionService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")

local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local GameConstants = require(Shared.Config.GameConstants)
local TeamConstants = require(Shared.Config.TeamConstants)

local TeamService = {}

local playerTeams = {}
local remotes = {}
local padConnections = {}
local padDebounce = {}
local ArenaRoundService = nil

local function ensureRemote(remoteName)
	local folder = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Remotes")
	if not folder then
		folder = Instance.new("Folder")
		folder.Name = "Remotes"
		folder.Parent = ReplicatedStorage
	end

	local remote = folder:FindFirstChild(remoteName)
	if not remote then
		remote = Instance.new("RemoteEvent")
		remote.Name = remoteName
		remote.Parent = folder
	end

	return remote
end

local function teamInfo(teamId)
	return TeamConstants.get(teamId) or TeamConstants.Teams.spectator
end

local function fireFeedback(player, payload)
	if remotes.CombatFeedback then
		remotes.CombatFeedback:FireClient(player, payload)
	end
end

local function countTeam(teamId)
	local count = 0
	for _, assignedTeamId in pairs(playerTeams) do
		if assignedTeamId == teamId then
			count += 1
		end
	end
	return count
end

local function applyPlayerAttributes(player, teamId)
	local info = teamInfo(teamId)
	player:SetAttribute("AR_TeamId", info.id)
	player:SetAttribute("AR_TeamName", info.displayName)
end

local function buildTeamPayload()
	local payload = {
		teamSizeTarget = TeamConstants.TeamSizeTarget,
		teams = {},
	}

	for _, info in ipairs(TeamConstants.listCombatTeams()) do
		local players = {}
		for player, teamId in pairs(playerTeams) do
			if player.Parent and teamId == info.id then
				table.insert(players, {
					userId = player.UserId,
					name = player.Name,
					displayName = player.DisplayName,
					teamId = teamId,
				})
			end
		end

		payload.teams[info.id] = {
			id = info.id,
			displayName = info.displayName,
			shortName = info.shortName,
			count = #players,
			players = players,
		}
	end

	payload.teams.spectator = {
		id = "spectator",
		displayName = "Spectator",
		shortName = "Spec",
		count = countTeam("spectator"),
		players = {},
	}

	return payload
end

local function findArena()
	local worldRoot = Workspace:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.RootName)
	return worldRoot and worldRoot:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.Arena3v3Name)
end

local function bindTeamPad(pad)
	if padConnections[pad] or not pad:IsA("BasePart") then
		return
	end

	CollectionService:AddTag(pad, GameConstants.World.Tags.TeamPad)
	padConnections[pad] = pad.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
		local character = hit and hit.Parent
		local player = character and Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(character)
		if not player then
			return
		end

		local now = os.clock()
		local key = tostring(player.UserId) .. ":" .. pad:GetFullName()
		if padDebounce[key] and now - padDebounce[key] < 1 then
			return
		end
		padDebounce[key] = now

		TeamService.SetPlayerTeam(player, tostring(pad:GetAttribute("TeamId") or ""))
	end)
end

local function bindTeamPads()
	local arena = findArena()
	local folder = arena and arena:FindFirstChild("TeamPads")
	if not folder then
		warn("[Aniverse Royale] Arena TeamPads missing. Apply the AR-003 blueprint.")
		return
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(folder:GetChildren()) do
		bindTeamPad(child)
	end

	folder.ChildAdded:Connect(bindTeamPad)
end

function TeamService.Start()
	remotes.RequestTeamChange = ensureRemote(GameConstants.Remotes.RequestTeamChange)
	remotes.TeamStateUpdate = ensureRemote(GameConstants.Remotes.TeamStateUpdate)
	remotes.CombatFeedback = ensureRemote(GameConstants.Remotes.CombatFeedback)

	remotes.RequestTeamChange.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, requestedTeamId)
		TeamService.SetPlayerTeam(player, tostring(requestedTeamId or ""))
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player)
		TeamService.SetPlayerTeam(player, TeamConstants.Ids.Spectator, true)
	end)

	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
		playerTeams[player] = nil
		padDebounce[player] = nil
		TeamService.Broadcast()
	end)

	for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
		TeamService.SetPlayerTeam(player, TeamConstants.Ids.Spectator, true)
	end

	task.defer(bindTeamPads)
end

function TeamService.SetArenaRoundService(service)
	ArenaRoundService = service
end

function TeamService.GetTeamInfo(teamId)
	return teamInfo(teamId)
end

function TeamService.GetPlayerTeam(player)
	return playerTeams[player] or player:GetAttribute("AR_TeamId") or TeamConstants.Ids.Spectator
end

function TeamService.SetPlayerTeam(player, teamId, silent)
	if not TeamConstants.isValid(teamId) then
		teamId = TeamConstants.Ids.Spectator
	end

	if ArenaRoundService and not ArenaRoundService.CanChangeTeam(player) then
		fireFeedback(player, {
			kind = "teamLocked",
			action = "Arena active",
		})
		return false
	end

	playerTeams[player] = teamId
	applyPlayerAttributes(player, teamId)

	if not silent then
		fireFeedback(player, {
			kind = "teamSelected",
			action = teamInfo(teamId).displayName,
		})
	end

	TeamService.Broadcast()
	return true
end

function TeamService.AutoAssignPlayer(player)
	local currentTeamId = TeamService.GetPlayerTeam(player)
	if TeamConstants.isCombatTeam(currentTeamId) then
		return currentTeamId
	end

	local sunCount = countTeam(TeamConstants.Ids.Sun)
	local moonCount = countTeam(TeamConstants.Ids.Moon)
	local teamId = sunCount <= moonCount and TeamConstants.Ids.Sun or TeamConstants.Ids.Moon
	TeamService.SetPlayerTeam(player, teamId, true)
	return teamId
end

function TeamService.GetTeamPlayers(teamId)
	local players = {}
	for player, assignedTeamId in pairs(playerTeams) do
		if player.Parent and assignedTeamId == teamId then
			table.insert(players, player)
		end
	end
	return players
end

function TeamService.AreAllies(playerA, playerB)
	local teamA = TeamService.GetPlayerTeam(playerA)
	local teamB = TeamService.GetPlayerTeam(playerB)
	return TeamConstants.isCombatTeam(teamA) and teamA == teamB
end

function TeamService.AreEnemies(playerA, playerB)
	local teamA = TeamService.GetPlayerTeam(playerA)
	local teamB = TeamService.GetPlayerTeam(playerB)
	return TeamConstants.isCombatTeam(teamA) and TeamConstants.isCombatTeam(teamB) and teamA ~= teamB
end

function TeamService.AreTeamIdsEnemies(teamA, teamB)
	return TeamConstants.isCombatTeam(teamA) and TeamConstants.isCombatTeam(teamB) and teamA ~= teamB
end

function TeamService.ClearTeams()
	for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
		TeamService.SetPlayerTeam(player, TeamConstants.Ids.Spectator, true)
	end
	TeamService.Broadcast()
end

function TeamService.Broadcast()
	if remotes.TeamStateUpdate then
		remotes.TeamStateUpdate:FireAllClients(buildTeamPayload())
	end
end

return TeamService

local CollectionService = game:GetService("CollectionService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")

local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local GameConstants = require(Shared.Config.GameConstants)
local ArenaConstants = require(Shared.Config.ArenaConstants)
local TeamConstants = require(Shared.Config.TeamConstants)

local ArenaRoundService = {}

local TeamService = nil
local CharacterService = nil
local CooldownService = nil
local BotService = nil
local remotes = {}
local startPadConnection = nil
local startPadDebounce = {}

local roundState = ArenaConstants.States.Idle
local roundNumber = 0
local countdownEndsAt = 0
local resetAt = 0
local winnerTeamId = nil
local scores = {
	sun = 0,
	moon = 0,
}

local function ensureRemote(remoteName)
	local folder = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Remotes")
	if not folder then
		folder = Instance.new("Folder")
		folder.Name = "Remotes"
		folder.Parent = ReplicatedStorage
	end

	local remote = folder:FindFirstChild(remoteName)
	if not remote then
		remote = Instance.new("RemoteEvent")
		remote.Name = remoteName
		remote.Parent = folder
	end

	return remote
end

local function findArena()
	local worldRoot = Workspace:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.RootName)
	return worldRoot and worldRoot:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.Arena3v3Name)
end

local function findFolder(name)
	local arena = findArena()
	return arena and arena:FindFirstChild(name)
end

local function getSpawnFolder(teamId)
	if teamId == TeamConstants.Ids.Sun then
		return findFolder(ArenaConstants.World.SunSpawnPoints)
	elseif teamId == TeamConstants.Ids.Moon then
		return findFolder(ArenaConstants.World.MoonSpawnPoints)
	end
	return nil
end

local function sortedParts(folder)
	local parts = {}
	if not folder then
		return parts
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(folder:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("BasePart") then
			table.insert(parts, child)
		end
	end

	table.sort(parts, function(a, b)
		return a.Name < b.Name
	end)
	return parts
end

local function teleportPlayer(player, targetPart)
	local character = player.Character
	local root = character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	if root and targetPart then
		root.CFrame = targetPart.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 4, 0)
		root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
	end
end

local function teleportTeam(teamId)
	local players = TeamService.GetTeamPlayers(teamId)
	local spawns = sortedParts(getSpawnFolder(teamId))
	for index, player in ipairs(players) do
		teleportPlayer(player, spawns[((index - 1) % math.max(#spawns, 1)) + 1])
	end
end

local function teleportToSpectator(player)
	local spectator = findFolder(ArenaConstants.World.SpectatorPlatform)
	local target = spectator and (spectator:IsA("BasePart") and spectator or spectator:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart"))
	teleportPlayer(player, target)
end

local function countLivingPlayers(teamId)
	local count = 0
	for _, player in ipairs(TeamService.GetTeamPlayers(teamId)) do
		if not CharacterService.IsDefeated(player) then
			count += 1
		end
	end
	return count
end

local function countLivingCombatants(teamId)
	local count = countLivingPlayers(teamId)
	if BotService then
		count += #BotService.GetLivingBots(teamId)
	end
	return count
end

local function hasEnoughCombatants()
	return countLivingCombatants(TeamConstants.Ids.Sun) >= GameConstants.Arena.MinimumCombatantsPerTeam
		and countLivingCombatants(TeamConstants.Ids.Moon) >= GameConstants.Arena.MinimumCombatantsPerTeam
end

local function fireFeedback(player, payload)
	if remotes.CombatFeedback then
		remotes.CombatFeedback:FireClient(player, payload)
	end
end

local function broadcast()
	if remotes.ArenaStateUpdate then
		remotes.ArenaStateUpdate:FireAllClients(ArenaRoundService.GetClientState())
	end
	if CharacterService then
		CharacterService.SendAllStates()
	end
end

local function resetRoundCombatants()
	if BotService then
		BotService.ResetBots()
	end

	for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
		if TeamConstants.isCombatTeam(TeamService.GetPlayerTeam(player)) then
			CharacterService.ResetPlayerState(player)
			if CooldownService then
				CooldownService.ResetPlayer(player)
			end
		end
	end
end

local function beginCountdown(requestingPlayer)
	if roundState ~= ArenaConstants.States.Idle and roundState ~= ArenaConstants.States.Resetting then
		fireFeedback(requestingPlayer, {
			kind = "arenaBusy",
			action = roundState,
		})
		return false
	end

	for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
		if TeamConstants.isCombatTeam(TeamService.GetPlayerTeam(player)) then
			continue
		end
		TeamService.AutoAssignPlayer(player)
	end

	resetRoundCombatants()
	if not hasEnoughCombatants() then
		fireFeedback(requestingPlayer, {
			kind = "arenaNeedsTeams",
			action = "Need Sun and Moon combatants",
		})
		return false
	end

	roundNumber += 1
	winnerTeamId = nil
	roundState = ArenaConstants.States.Countdown
	countdownEndsAt = os.clock() + ArenaConstants.CountdownSeconds
	teleportTeam(TeamConstants.Ids.Sun)
	teleportTeam(TeamConstants.Ids.Moon)
	broadcast()
	return true
end

local function activateRound()
	roundState = ArenaConstants.States.Active
	broadcast()
end

local function endRound(teamId)
	if roundState ~= ArenaConstants.States.Active then
		return
	end

	winnerTeamId = teamId
	if scores[teamId] then
		scores[teamId] += 1
	end
	roundState = ArenaConstants.States.RoundOver
	resetAt = os.clock() + ArenaConstants.ResetSeconds
	broadcast()
end

local function resetToIdle()
	roundState = ArenaConstants.States.Resetting
	broadcast()
	task.delay(0.8, function()
		if roundState == ArenaConstants.States.Resetting then
			resetRoundCombatants()
			roundState = ArenaConstants.States.Idle
			winnerTeamId = nil
			broadcast()
		end
	end)
end

local function bindStartPad()
	local arena = findArena()
	local pad = arena and arena:FindFirstChild(ArenaConstants.World.StartRoundPad)
	if startPadConnection or not pad or not pad:IsA("BasePart") then
		if not pad then
			warn("[Aniverse Royale] Arena StartRoundPad missing. Apply the AR-003 blueprint.")
		end
		return
	end

	CollectionService:AddTag(pad, GameConstants.World.Tags.ArenaStartPad)
	startPadConnection = pad.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
		local character = hit and hit.Parent
		local player = character and Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(character)
		if not player then
			return
		end

		local now = os.clock()
		if startPadDebounce[player] and now - startPadDebounce[player] < 1.5 then
			return
		end
		startPadDebounce[player] = now
		ArenaRoundService.RequestStart(player)
	end)
end

function ArenaRoundService.Start(dependencies)
	TeamService = dependencies.TeamService
	CharacterService = dependencies.CharacterService
	CooldownService = dependencies.CooldownService
	BotService = dependencies.BotService

	remotes.RequestArenaStart = ensureRemote(GameConstants.Remotes.RequestArenaStart)
	remotes.ArenaStateUpdate = ensureRemote(GameConstants.Remotes.ArenaStateUpdate)
	remotes.CombatFeedback = ensureRemote(GameConstants.Remotes.CombatFeedback)

	remotes.RequestArenaStart.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player)
		ArenaRoundService.RequestStart(player)
	end)

	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
		startPadDebounce[player] = nil
	end)

	task.defer(bindStartPad)
	task.defer(broadcast)
end

function ArenaRoundService.RequestStart(player)
	return beginCountdown(player)
end

function ArenaRoundService.Step()
	local now = os.clock()
	if roundState == ArenaConstants.States.Countdown and now >= countdownEndsAt then
		activateRound()
	elseif roundState == ArenaConstants.States.Active then
		local sunAlive = countLivingCombatants(TeamConstants.Ids.Sun)
		local moonAlive = countLivingCombatants(TeamConstants.Ids.Moon)
		if sunAlive <= 0 and moonAlive > 0 then
			endRound(TeamConstants.Ids.Moon)
		elseif moonAlive <= 0 and sunAlive > 0 then
			endRound(TeamConstants.Ids.Sun)
		end
	elseif roundState == ArenaConstants.States.RoundOver and now >= resetAt then
		resetToIdle()
	end
end

function ArenaRoundService.RecordPlayerDefeated(player)
	if roundState == ArenaConstants.States.Active then
		teleportToSpectator(player)
		broadcast()
	end
end

function ArenaRoundService.CanChangeCharacter()
	return roundState ~= ArenaConstants.States.Countdown and roundState ~= ArenaConstants.States.Active
end

function ArenaRoundService.CanChangeTeam()
	return roundState ~= ArenaConstants.States.Countdown and roundState ~= ArenaConstants.States.Active
end

function ArenaRoundService.IsActive()
	return roundState == ArenaConstants.States.Active
end

function ArenaRoundService.GetState()
	return roundState
end

function ArenaRoundService.GetClientState()
	local remaining = 0
	if roundState == ArenaConstants.States.Countdown then
		remaining = math.max(0, countdownEndsAt - os.clock())
	elseif roundState == ArenaConstants.States.RoundOver then
		remaining = math.max(0, resetAt - os.clock())
	end

	local winnerInfo = winnerTeamId and TeamConstants.get(winnerTeamId)
	return {
		mode = GameConstants.Match.ArenaModeName,
		state = roundState,
		roundNumber = roundNumber,
		countdown = remaining,
		winnerTeamId = winnerTeamId,
		winnerName = winnerInfo and winnerInfo.displayName or "",
		scores = {
			sun = scores.sun,

local CollectionService = game:GetService("CollectionService")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")

local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local GameConstants = require(Shared.Config.GameConstants)
local ArenaConstants = require(Shared.Config.ArenaConstants)
local TeamConstants = require(Shared.Config.TeamConstants)

local BotService = {}

local remotes = {}
local bots = {}

local function ensureRemote(remoteName)
	local folder = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Remotes")
	if not folder then
		folder = Instance.new("Folder")
		folder.Name = "Remotes"
		folder.Parent = ReplicatedStorage
	end

	local remote = folder:FindFirstChild(remoteName)
	if not remote then
		remote = Instance.new("RemoteEvent")
		remote.Name = remoteName
		remote.Parent = folder
	end

	return remote
end

local function findArena()
	local worldRoot = Workspace:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.RootName)
	return worldRoot and worldRoot:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.Arena3v3Name)
end

local function getBody(model)
	return model:FindFirstChild("Body") or model:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
end

local function updateBillboard(bot)
	local body = getBody(bot.model)
	if not body then
		return
	end

	local billboard = body:FindFirstChild("HealthBillboard")
	local label = billboard and billboard:FindFirstChild("HealthText")
	if label and label:IsA("TextLabel") then
		label.Text = ("%s\n%s %d/%d | Shield %d"):format(
			bot.name,
			TeamConstants.get(bot.teamId).shortName,
			math.floor(bot.health),
			math.floor(bot.maxHealth),
			math.floor(bot.shield)
		)
	end
end

local function payloadBot(bot)
	return {
		id = bot.id,
		name = bot.name,
		teamId = bot.teamId,
		characterId = bot.characterId,
		health = bot.health,
		maxHealth = bot.maxHealth,
		shield = bot.shield,
		maxShield = bot.maxShield,
		alive = bot.health > 0,
	}
end

local function buildPayload()
	local payload = {
		bots = {},
		teams = {
			sun = {},
			moon = {},
		},
	}

	for _, bot in pairs(bots) do
		local item = payloadBot(bot)
		table.insert(payload.bots, item)
		if payload.teams[bot.teamId] then
			table.insert(payload.teams[bot.teamId], item)
		end
	end

	return payload
end

local function registerBot(model)
	local teamId = tostring(model:GetAttribute("TeamId") or "")
	if not TeamConstants.isCombatTeam(teamId) then
		return
	end

	local bot = {
		id = model.Name,
		name = tostring(model:GetAttribute("DisplayName") or model.Name),
		model = model,
		teamId = teamId,
		characterId = tostring(model:GetAttribute("CharacterId") or "kairo_soljin"),
		maxHealth = model:GetAttribute("MaxHealth") or ArenaConstants.BotHealth,
		maxShield = model:GetAttribute("MaxShield") or ArenaConstants.BotShield,
		health = model:GetAttribute("CurrentHealth") or model:GetAttribute("MaxHealth") or ArenaConstants.BotHealth,
		shield = model:GetAttribute("CurrentShield") or model:GetAttribute("MaxShield") or ArenaConstants.BotShield,
	}

	model:SetAttribute("AR_TeamId", bot.teamId)
	model:SetAttribute("AR_TeamName", TeamConstants.get(bot.teamId).displayName)
	model:SetAttribute("CurrentHealth", bot.health)
	model:SetAttribute("CurrentShield", bot.shield)
	model:SetAttribute("IsArenaBot", true)
	CollectionService:AddTag(model, GameConstants.World.Tags.ArenaBot)

	bots[model] = bot
	updateBillboard(bot)
end

local function refreshBots()
	table.clear(bots)

	local arena = findArena()
	local folder = arena and arena:FindFirstChild(ArenaConstants.World.ArenaBots)
	if not folder then
		warn("[Aniverse Royale] ArenaBots folder missing. Apply the AR-003 blueprint.")
		return
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(folder:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("Model") then
			registerBot(child)
		end
	end

	folder.ChildAdded:Connect(function(child)
		if child:IsA("Model") then
			registerBot(child)
			BotService.Broadcast()
		end
	end)
end

function BotService.Start()
	remotes.BotStateUpdate = ensureRemote(GameConstants.Remotes.BotStateUpdate)
	task.defer(function()
		refreshBots()
		BotService.Broadcast()
	end)
end

function BotService.Broadcast()
	if remotes.BotStateUpdate then
		remotes.BotStateUpdate:FireAllClients(buildPayload())
	end
end

function BotService.GetBots()
	local list = {}
	for _, bot in pairs(bots) do
		table.insert(list, bot)
	end
	return list
end

function BotService.GetLivingBots(teamId)
	local list = {}
	for _, bot in pairs(bots) do
		if bot.health > 0 and (not teamId or bot.teamId == teamId) then
			table.insert(list, bot)
		end
	end
	return list
end

function BotService.GetBody(bot)
	return bot and getBody(bot.model)
end

function BotService.ApplyDamage(bot, amount)
	if not bot or bot.health <= 0 then
		return 0
	end

	local finalDamage = amount
	local reductionUntil = bot.model:GetAttribute("DamageReductionUntil") or 0
	if os.clock() < reductionUntil then
		finalDamage = math.floor(finalDamage * (1 - (bot.model:GetAttribute("DamageReduction") or 0)))
	end

	local shieldDamage = math.min(bot.shield, finalDamage)
	bot.shield -= shieldDamage
	bot.health = math.max(0, bot.health - (finalDamage - shieldDamage))
	bot.model:SetAttribute("CurrentHealth", bot.health)
	bot.model:SetAttribute("CurrentShield", bot.shield)
	bot.model:SetAttribute("Defeated", bot.health <= 0)
	updateBillboard(bot)
	BotService.Broadcast()
	return finalDamage
end

function BotService.Heal(bot, amount)
	if not bot or bot.health <= 0 then
		return 0
	end

	local before = bot.health
	bot.health = math.min(bot.maxHealth, bot.health + amount)
	bot.model:SetAttribute("CurrentHealth", bot.health)
	updateBillboard(bot)
	BotService.Broadcast()
	return bot.health - before
end

function BotService.AddShield(bot, amount)
	if not bot or bot.health <= 0 then
		return 0
	end

	local before = bot.shield
	bot.shield = math.min(bot.maxShield + GameConstants.Combat.TemporaryShieldCap, bot.shield + amount)
	bot.model:SetAttribute("CurrentShield", bot.shield)
	updateBillboard(bot)
	BotService.Broadcast()
	return bot.shield - before
end

function BotService.SetDamageReduction(bot, amount, duration)
	if not bot or bot.health <= 0 then
		return
	end

	bot.model:SetAttribute("DamageReduction", amount)
	bot.model:SetAttribute("DamageReductionUntil", os.clock() + duration)
	BotService.Broadcast()
end

function BotService.SetSlow(bot, multiplier, duration)
	if not bot or bot.health <= 0 then
		return
	end

	bot.model:SetAttribute("Slowed", true)
	bot.model:SetAttribute("SlowMultiplier", multiplier)
	task.delay(duration, function()
		if bot.model.Parent then
			bot.model:SetAttribute("Slowed", false)
		end
	end)
	BotService.Broadcast()
end

function BotService.Mark(bot, duration)
	if not bot or bot.health <= 0 then
		return
	end

	bot.model:SetAttribute("LightMarked", true)
	task.delay(duration, function()
		if bot.model.Parent then
			bot.model:SetAttribute("LightMarked", false)
		end
	end)
	BotService.Broadcast()
end

function BotService.ResetBots()
	refreshBots()
	for _, bot in pairs(bots) do
		bot.health = bot.maxHealth
		bot.shield = bot.maxShield
		bot.model:SetAttribute("CurrentHealth", bot.health)
		bot.model:SetAttribute("CurrentShield", bot.shield)
		bot.model:SetAttribute("Defeated", false)
		bot.model:SetAttribute("LightMarked", false)
		bot.model:SetAttribute("Slowed", false)
		updateBillboard(bot)
	end
	BotService.Broadcast()
end

return BotService

local CollectionService = game:GetService("CollectionService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")

local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local GameConstants = require(Shared.Config.GameConstants)
local CharacterDefinitions = require(Shared.Config.CharacterDefinitions)
local TableUtil = require(Shared.Utility.TableUtil)

local CharacterService = {}

local TeamService = nil
local ArenaRoundService = nil
local statesByPlayer = {}
local remotes = {}
local padConnections = {}
local padDebounce = {}

local function ensureRemote(remoteName)
	local folder = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Remotes")
	if not folder then
		folder = Instance.new("Folder")
		folder.Name = "Remotes"
		folder.Parent = ReplicatedStorage
	end

	local remote = folder:FindFirstChild(remoteName)
	if not remote then
		remote = Instance.new("RemoteEvent")
		remote.Name = remoteName
		remote.Parent = folder
	end

	return remote

local function selectedDefinition(state)
	return CharacterDefinitions.get(state.selectedCharacterId) or CharacterDefinitions.get(CharacterDefinitions.DefaultId)
end

local function buildStateFromDefinition(characterId)
	local definition = CharacterDefinitions.get(characterId) or CharacterDefinitions.get(CharacterDefinitions.DefaultId)
	local stats = definition.baseStats

	return {
		selectedCharacterId = definition.id,
		health = stats.health,
		maxHealth = stats.health,
		shield = stats.shield,
		maxShield = stats.shield,
		tempShield = 0,
		flow = stats.flow,
		maxFlow = stats.flow,
		guard = stats.guard,
		maxGuard = stats.guard,
		ultimateCharge = 0,
		blocking = false,
		blockBrokenUntil = 0,
		sprinting = false,
		dashing = false,
		sliding = false,
		doubleJumped = false,
		defeated = false,
		lastDashAt = 0,
		lastSlideAt = 0,
		lastDoubleJumpAt = 0,
		lastWallKickAt = 0,
		sunburstGuardUntil = 0,
		slowUntil = 0,
		slowMultiplier = 1,
		damageReductionUntil = 0,
		damageReductionMultiplier = 0,
		lastStateSentAt = 0,
	}
end

local function getHumanoid(player)
	local character = player.Character
	return character and character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
end

local function getRoot(player)
	local character = player.Character
	return character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
end

local function applyMovementStats(player)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	if not state then
		return
	end

	local humanoid = getHumanoid(player)
	if not humanoid then
		return
	end

	local definition = selectedDefinition(state)
	local stats = definition.baseStats
	local speed = state.sprinting and stats.sprintSpeed or stats.walkSpeed
	if os.clock() < (state.slowUntil or 0) then
		speed *= state.slowMultiplier or 1
	end

	humanoid.MaxHealth = state.maxHealth
	humanoid.Health = math.clamp(state.health, state.defeated and 1 or 1, state.maxHealth)
	humanoid.WalkSpeed = speed
end

local function getTeamPayload(player)
	if not TeamService then
		return {
			id = "spectator",
			name = "Spectator",
		}
	end

	local teamId = TeamService.GetPlayerTeam(player)
	local teamInfo = TeamService.GetTeamInfo(teamId)
	return {
		id = teamId,
		name = teamInfo.displayName,
	}
end

local function getArenaPayload()
	if not ArenaRoundService then
		return {
			mode = GameConstants.Match.ModeName,
			state = GameConstants.Match.SandboxState,
		}
	end

	return ArenaRoundService.GetClientState()
end

local function serializeState(player, extra)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	if not state then
		return nil
	end

	local definition = selectedDefinition(state)
	local payload = {
		character = {
			id = definition.id,
			displayName = definition.displayName,
			subtitle = definition.subtitle,
			role = definition.role,
			aura = definition.aura,
			passive = definition.passive,
			abilities = TableUtil.shallowCopy(definition.abilities),
		},
		stats = {
			health = state.health,
			maxHealth = state.maxHealth,
			shield = state.shield,
			maxShield = state.maxShield,
			tempShield = state.tempShield,
			flow = state.flow,
			maxFlow = state.maxFlow,
			guard = state.guard,
			maxGuard = state.maxGuard,
			ultimateCharge = state.ultimateCharge,
			blocking = state.blocking,
			blockBroken = os.clock() < state.blockBrokenUntil,
			defeated = state.defeated,
			slowed = os.clock() < (state.slowUntil or 0),
			damageReduction = os.clock() < (state.damageReductionUntil or 0),
		},
		movement = {
			sprinting = state.sprinting,
			dashing = state.dashing,
			sliding = state.sliding,
			doubleJumped = state.doubleJumped,
			lastDashAt = state.lastDashAt,
			lastSlideAt = state.lastSlideAt,
			lastDoubleJumpAt = state.lastDoubleJumpAt,
			lastWallKickAt = state.lastWallKickAt,
		},
		match = {
			mode = GameConstants.Match.ModeName,
			state = GameConstants.Match.SandboxState,
			teamSizeTarget = GameConstants.Match.TeamSizeTarget,
			futureTargetPlayers = GameConstants.Match.FutureTargetPlayers,
		},
		team = getTeamPayload(player),
		arena = getArenaPayload(),
	}

	if extra then
		for key, value in pairs(extra) do
			payload[key] = value
		end
	end

	return payload
end

local function fireFeedback(player, payload)
	if remotes.CombatFeedback then
		remotes.CombatFeedback:FireClient(player, payload)
	end
end

local function onCharacterAdded(player)
	task.defer(function()
		applyMovementStats(player)
		CharacterService.SendState(player)
	end)
end

local function onPlayerAdded(player)
	if not statesByPlayer[player] then
		statesByPlayer[player] = buildStateFromDefinition(CharacterDefinitions.DefaultId)
	end

	player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
		onCharacterAdded(player)
	end)

	if player.Character then
		onCharacterAdded(player)
	end

	CharacterService.SendState(player)
end

local function onPlayerRemoving(player)
	statesByPlayer[player] = nil
	padDebounce[player] = nil
end

local function findCharacterPads()
	local worldRoot = Workspace:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.RootName)
	local dojo = worldRoot and worldRoot:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.TrainingDojoName)
	return dojo and dojo:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.CharacterPadFolderName)
end

local function bindPad(pad)
	if padConnections[pad] or not pad:IsA("BasePart") then
		return
	end

	CollectionService:AddTag(pad, GameConstants.World.Tags.CharacterPad)
	padConnections[pad] = pad.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
		local character = hit and hit.Parent
		local player = character and Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(character)
		if not player then
			return
		end

		local now = os.clock()
		local key = tostring(player.UserId) .. ":" .. pad:GetFullName()
		if padDebounce[key] and now - padDebounce[key] < 1 then
			return
		end
		padDebounce[key] = now

		local characterId = tostring(pad:GetAttribute("CharacterId") or "")
		if CharacterService.SetSelectedCharacter(player, characterId) then
			local definition = CharacterDefinitions.get(characterId)
			fireFeedback(player, {
				kind = "selected",
				action = definition and definition.displayName or characterId,
			})
		end
	end)
end

local function bindCharacterPads()
	local padsFolder = findCharacterPads()
	if not padsFolder then
		warn("[Aniverse Royale] CharacterPads folder missing. Apply the AR-002 or AR-003 blueprint.")
		return
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(padsFolder:GetChildren()) do
		bindPad(child)
	end

	padsFolder.ChildAdded:Connect(bindPad)
end

function CharacterService.Start(dependencies)
	dependencies = dependencies or {}
	TeamService = dependencies.TeamService
	ArenaRoundService = dependencies.ArenaRoundService

	remotes.RequestCharacterChange = ensureRemote(GameConstants.Remotes.RequestCharacterChange)
	remotes.StateUpdate = ensureRemote(GameConstants.Remotes.StateUpdate)
	remotes.CombatFeedback = ensureRemote(GameConstants.Remotes.CombatFeedback)

	remotes.RequestCharacterChange.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, requestedCharacterId)
		if CharacterService.SetSelectedCharacter(player, tostring(requestedCharacterId or "")) then
			local definition = CharacterService.GetDefinition(player)
			fireFeedback(player, {
				kind = "selected",
				action = definition and definition.displayName or "Riftborn",
			})
		end
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(onPlayerAdded)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(onPlayerRemoving)

	for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
		onPlayerAdded(player)
	end

	task.defer(bindCharacterPads)
end

function CharacterService.SetArenaRoundService(service)
	ArenaRoundService = service
end

function CharacterService.Step(deltaTime)
	local now = os.clock()

	for player, state in pairs(statesByPlayer) do
		if state.health > 0 and not state.defeated then
			state.flow = math.min(state.maxFlow, state.flow + GameConstants.Movement.FlowRegenPerSecond * deltaTime)

			local guardRegen = GameConstants.Movement.GuardRegenPerSecond
			if state.selectedCharacterId == "atlas_null" then
				guardRegen *= 1.18
			end

			if not state.blocking and now >= state.blockBrokenUntil then
				state.guard = math.min(state.maxGuard, state.guard + guardRegen * deltaTime)
			end
		end

		if state.dashing and now - state.lastDashAt > GameConstants.Movement.DashDuration then
			state.dashing = false
		end

		if state.sliding and now - state.lastSlideAt > 0.45 then
			state.sliding = false
		end

		if state.slowUntil > 0 and now >= state.slowUntil then
			state.slowUntil = 0
			state.slowMultiplier = 1
			applyMovementStats(player)
		end

		if now - state.lastStateSentAt >= 0.2 then
			CharacterService.SendState(player)
		end
	end
end

function CharacterService.GetState(player)
	return statesByPlayer[player]
end

function CharacterService.GetDefinition(player)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	if not state then
		return nil
	end
	return selectedDefinition(state)
end

function CharacterService.SetSelectedCharacter(player, characterId)
	if ArenaRoundService and not ArenaRoundService.CanChangeCharacter(player) then
		CharacterService.SendState(player, {
			error = "Character locked during arena round.",
		})
		return false
	end

	if not CharacterDefinitions.exists(characterId) then
		CharacterService.SendState(player, {
			error = "Unknown Riftborn.",
		})
		return false
	end

	statesByPlayer[player] = buildStateFromDefinition(characterId)
	applyMovementStats(player)
	CharacterService.SendState(player)
	return true
end

function CharacterService.ResetPlayerState(player)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	local selectedCharacterId = state and state.selectedCharacterId or CharacterDefinitions.DefaultId
	statesByPlayer[player] = buildStateFromDefinition(selectedCharacterId)
	applyMovementStats(player)
	CharacterService.SendState(player)
end

function CharacterService.SetSprinting(player, isSprinting)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	if not state or state.defeated then
		return
	end

	state.sprinting = isSprinting == true
	applyMovementStats(player)
	CharacterService.SendState(player)
end

function CharacterService.SetMovementState(player, patch)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	if not state or state.defeated then
		return
	end

	for key, value in pairs(patch or {}) do
		state[key] = value
	end

	CharacterService.SendState(player)
end

function CharacterService.TrySpendFlow(player, amount)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	if not state or state.defeated or state.flow < amount then
		return false
	end

	state.flow -= amount
	CharacterService.SendState(player)
	return true
end

function CharacterService.SetBlocking(player, isBlocking)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	if not state or state.defeated then
		return false
	end

	if isBlocking and os.clock() < state.blockBrokenUntil then
		return false
	end

	state.blocking = isBlocking == true
	CharacterService.SendState(player)
	return true
end

function CharacterService.AddShield(player, amount)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	if not state or state.defeated then
		return 0
	end

	local cap = state.maxShield + GameConstants.Combat.TemporaryShieldCap
	local before = state.shield
	state.shield = math.min(cap, state.shield + amount)
	state.tempShield = math.max(0, state.shield - state.maxShield)
	CharacterService.SendState(player)
	return state.shield - before
end

function CharacterService.Heal(player, amount)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	if not state or state.defeated then
		return 0
	end

	local before = state.health
	state.health = math.min(state.maxHealth, state.health + amount)
	applyMovementStats(player)
	CharacterService.SendState(player)
	return state.health - before
end

function CharacterService.AddUltimateCharge(player, amount)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	if not state then
		return
	end

	-- AR-003 still uses cooldown-based ultimates. This charge is saved for the AR-004+ conversion.
	state.ultimateCharge = math.clamp((state.ultimateCharge or 0) + amount, 0, 100)
	CharacterService.SendState(player)
end

function CharacterService.SetSlow(player, multiplier, duration)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	if not state or state.defeated then
		return
	end

	state.slowMultiplier = math.clamp(multiplier or 1, 0.2, 1)
	state.slowUntil = math.max(state.slowUntil or 0, os.clock() + (duration or 0))
	applyMovementStats(player)
	CharacterService.SendState(player)
end

function CharacterService.SetDamageReduction(player, multiplier, duration)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	if not state or state.defeated then
		return
	end

	state.damageReductionMultiplier = math.clamp(multiplier or 0, 0, 0.8)
	state.damageReductionUntil = math.max(state.damageReductionUntil or 0, os.clock() + (duration or 0))
	CharacterService.SendState(player)
end

function CharacterService.MarkDefeated(player)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	if not state then
		return
	end

	state.health = 0
	state.shield = 0
	state.tempShield = 0
	state.blocking = false
	state.defeated = true

	local humanoid = getHumanoid(player)
	if humanoid then
		humanoid.Health = 1
	end

	local root = getRoot(player)
	if root then
		root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
	end

	CharacterService.SendState(player)
end

function CharacterService.IsDefeated(player)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	return not state or state.defeated or state.health <= 0
end

function CharacterService.SendState(player, extra)
	local state = statesByPlayer[player]
	if not state or not remotes.StateUpdate then
		return
	end

	state.lastStateSentAt = os.clock()
	remotes.StateUpdate:FireClient(player, serializeState(player, extra))
end

function CharacterService.SendAllStates(extra)
	for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
		CharacterService.SendState(player, extra)
	end
end

return CharacterService

	[GameConstants.Actions.Skill3] = true,
	[GameConstants.Actions.Ultimate] = true,
}

local function ensureRemote(remoteName)
	local folder = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Remotes")
	if not folder then
		folder = Instance.new("Folder")
		folder.Name = "Remotes"
		folder.Parent = ReplicatedStorage
	end

	local remote = folder:FindFirstChild(remoteName)
	if not remote then
		remote = Instance.new("RemoteEvent")
		remote.Name = remoteName
		remote.Parent = folder
	end

	return remote
end

local function getRoot(player)
	local character = player.Character
	return character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
end

local function getDummyBody(dummy)
	return dummy:FindFirstChild("Body") or dummy:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
end

local function fireFeedback(player, payload)
	if remotes.CombatFeedback then
		remotes.CombatFeedback:FireClient(player, payload)
	end
end

local function fireAll(payload)
	if remotes.CombatFeedback then
		remotes.CombatFeedback:FireAllClients(payload)
	end
end

local function updateDummyBillboard(dummy)
	local body = getDummyBody(dummy)
	if not body then
		return
	end

	local billboard = body:FindFirstChild("HealthBillboard")
	local label = billboard and billboard:FindFirstChild("HealthText")
	if label and label:IsA("TextLabel") then
		local health = math.max(0, dummy:GetAttribute("CurrentHealth") or GameConstants.Combat.DummyMaxHealth)
		local maxHealth = dummy:GetAttribute("MaxHealth") or GameConstants.Combat.DummyMaxHealth
		local shield = math.max(0, dummy:GetAttribute("CurrentShield") or 0)
		local dummyType = tostring(dummy:GetAttribute("DummyType") or "Basic")
		local shieldText = shield > 0 and (" | Shield " .. tostring(math.floor(shield))) or ""
		label.Text = ("%s Dummy\n%d/%d%s"):format(dummyType, math.floor(health), math.floor(maxHealth), shieldText)
	end
end

local function refreshDummies()
	table.clear(dummyModels)

	local worldRoot = Workspace:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.RootName)
	local dojo = worldRoot and worldRoot:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.TrainingDojoName)
	local folder = dojo and dojo:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.DummyFolderName)
	if not folder then
		warn("[Aniverse Royale] DamageDummies folder missing. Apply blueprints/ar003/ar003_3v3_arena.blueprint.json.")
		return
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(folder:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("Model") then
			CollectionService:AddTag(child, GameConstants.World.Tags.DamageDummy)
			child:SetAttribute("IsDamageDummy", true)
			child:SetAttribute("MaxHealth", child:GetAttribute("MaxHealth") or GameConstants.Combat.DummyMaxHealth)
			child:SetAttribute("CurrentHealth", child:GetAttribute("CurrentHealth") or child:GetAttribute("MaxHealth"))

			if child:GetAttribute("DummyType") == "Shield" then
				child:SetAttribute("MaxShield", child:GetAttribute("MaxShield") or 120)
				child:SetAttribute("CurrentShield", child:GetAttribute("CurrentShield") or child:GetAttribute("MaxShield"))
			end

			table.insert(dummyModels, child)
			updateDummyBillboard(child)
		end
	end
end

local function applyDamageToDummy(attacker, dummy, amount)
	local maxHealth = dummy:GetAttribute("MaxHealth") or GameConstants.Combat.DummyMaxHealth
	local current = dummy:GetAttribute("CurrentHealth") or maxHealth
	local finalDamage = amount
	local absorbed = 0

	if dummy:GetAttribute("DummyType") == "Guard" then
		finalDamage = math.max(1, math.floor(finalDamage * 0.45))
	elseif dummy:GetAttribute("DummyType") == "Shield" then
		local shield = dummy:GetAttribute("CurrentShield") or 0
		absorbed = math.min(shield, finalDamage)
		shield -= absorbed
		dummy:SetAttribute("CurrentShield", shield)
		finalDamage -= absorbed
	end

	current = math.max(0, current - finalDamage)
	dummy:SetAttribute("CurrentHealth", current)
	updateDummyBillboard(dummy)

	if current <= 0 and not dummy:GetAttribute("ResetPending") then
		dummy:SetAttribute("ResetPending", true)
		task.delay(GameConstants.Combat.DummyResetDelay, function()
			if dummy.Parent then
				dummy:SetAttribute("CurrentHealth", maxHealth)
				if dummy:GetAttribute("MaxShield") then
					dummy:SetAttribute("CurrentShield", dummy:GetAttribute("MaxShield"))
				end
				dummy:SetAttribute("ResetPending", false)
				updateDummyBillboard(dummy)
			end
		end)
	end

	return finalDamage + absorbed
end

local function canDamageTeam(attacker, targetTeamId)
	if not TeamService then
		return false
	end

	local attackerTeamId = TeamService.GetPlayerTeam(attacker)
	return TeamService.AreTeamIdsEnemies(attackerTeamId, targetTeamId)
end

local function canDamagePlayer(attacker, targetPlayer)
	if attacker == targetPlayer then
		return false
	end

	if not TeamService then
		return true
	end

	local attackerTeamId = TeamService.GetPlayerTeam(attacker)
	local targetTeamId = TeamService.GetPlayerTeam(targetPlayer)
	if TeamConstants.isCombatTeam(attackerTeamId) or TeamConstants.isCombatTeam(targetTeamId) then
		return TeamService.AreEnemies(attacker, targetPlayer)
	end

	return false
end

local function isAllyPlayer(attacker, targetPlayer)
	return attacker == targetPlayer or (TeamService and TeamService.AreAllies(attacker, targetPlayer))
end

local function applyDamageReduction(targetPlayer, amount)
	local state = CharacterService.GetState(targetPlayer)
	if not state then
		return amount
	end

	local finalDamage = amount
	if state.sunburstGuardUntil and os.clock() < state.sunburstGuardUntil then
		finalDamage = math.floor(finalDamage * 0.55)
	end
	if state.damageReductionUntil and os.clock() < state.damageReductionUntil then
		finalDamage = math.floor(finalDamage * (1 - (state.damageReductionMultiplier or 0)))
	end

	return math.max(0, finalDamage)
end

local function applyDamageToPlayer(attacker, targetPlayer, amount, knockback)
	if not canDamagePlayer(attacker, targetPlayer) then
		return 0
	end

	local state = CharacterService.GetState(targetPlayer)
	if not state or state.health <= 0 or state.defeated then
		return 0
	end

	local finalDamage = applyDamageReduction(targetPlayer, amount)
	if state.blocking and os.clock() >= state.blockBrokenUntil then
		finalDamage = math.floor(finalDamage * GameConstants.Combat.BlockDamageMultiplier)
		state.guard = math.max(0, state.guard - amount * GameConstants.Combat.BlockGuardDamageMultiplier)

		if state.guard <= 0 then
			state.blocking = false
			state.blockBrokenUntil = os.clock() + GameConstants.Combat.BlockBreakLockout
			fireFeedback(targetPlayer, { kind = "blockBreak" })
		else
			fireFeedback(targetPlayer, { kind = "guarded", amount = finalDamage })
		end
	end

	local shieldDamage = math.min(state.shield, finalDamage)
	state.shield -= shieldDamage
	state.tempShield = math.max(0, state.shield - state.maxShield)
	state.health = math.max(0, state.health - (finalDamage - shieldDamage))

	local root = getRoot(targetPlayer)
	if root and knockback then
		local definition = CharacterService.GetDefinition(targetPlayer)
		local multiplier = definition and definition.baseStats.knockbackMultiplier or 1
		root.AssemblyLinearVelocity += knockback * multiplier
	end

	if state.health <= 0 then
		CharacterService.MarkDefeated(targetPlayer)
		if ArenaRoundService then
			ArenaRoundService.RecordPlayerDefeated(targetPlayer)
		end
	else
		CharacterService.SendState(targetPlayer)
	end

	fireFeedback(targetPlayer, { kind = "tookDamage", amount = finalDamage })
	return finalDamage
end

local function collectTargets(attacker, range, radius, useCone, includeBots)
	refreshDummies()

	local root = getRoot(attacker)
	if not root then
		return {}
	end

	local origin = root.Position
	local forward = root.CFrame.LookVector
	local targets = {}

	for _, dummy in ipairs(dummyModels) do
		local body = getDummyBody(dummy)
		if body then
			local offset = body.Position - origin
			local distance = offset.Magnitude
			local inFront = distance > 0 and offset.Unit:Dot(forward) >= 0.2
			if distance <= range and (not useCone or inFront or distance <= radius) then
				table.insert(targets, { kind = "dummy", dummy = dummy, position = body.Position })
			end
		end
	end

	if includeBots and BotService then
		for _, bot in ipairs(BotService.GetBots()) do
			local body = BotService.GetBody(bot)
			if body and bot.health > 0 and canDamageTeam(attacker, bot.teamId) then
				local offset = body.Position - origin
				local distance = offset.Magnitude
				local inFront = distance > 0 and offset.Unit:Dot(forward) >= 0.2
				if distance <= range and (not useCone or inFront or distance <= radius) then
					table.insert(targets, { kind = "bot", bot = bot, position = body.Position })
				end
			end
		end
	end

	for _, targetPlayer in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
		if canDamagePlayer(attacker, targetPlayer) then
			local targetRoot = getRoot(targetPlayer)
			if targetRoot then
				local offset = targetRoot.Position - origin
				local distance = offset.Magnitude
				local inFront = distance > 0 and offset.Unit:Dot(forward) >= 0.2
				if distance <= range and (not useCone or inFront or distance <= radius) then
					table.insert(targets, { kind = "player", player = targetPlayer, position = targetRoot.Position })
				end
			end
		end
	end

	return targets
end

local function collectTargetsAroundPosition(attacker, position, radius, includeBots)
	refreshDummies()

	local targets = {}

	if BotService and includeBots then
		for _, bot in ipairs(BotService.GetBots()) do
			local body = BotService.GetBody(bot)
			if body and bot.health > 0 and canDamageTeam(attacker, bot.teamId) then
				if (body.Position - position).Magnitude <= radius then
					table.insert(targets, { kind = "bot", bot = bot, position = body.Position })
				end
			end
		end
	end

	for _, targetPlayer in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
		if canDamagePlayer(attacker, targetPlayer) then
			local targetRoot = getRoot(targetPlayer)
			if targetRoot and (targetRoot.Position - position).Magnitude <= radius then
				table.insert(targets, { kind = "player", player = targetPlayer, position = targetRoot.Position })
			end
		end
	end

	for _, dummy in ipairs(dummyModels) do
		local body = getDummyBody(dummy)
		if body and (body.Position - position).Magnitude <= radius then
			table.insert(targets, { kind = "dummy", dummy = dummy, position = body.Position })
		end
	end

	return targets
end

local function damageTargets(attacker, targets, amount, knockbackScale)
	local root = getRoot(attacker)
	local forward = root and root.CFrame.LookVector or Vector3.new(0, 0, -1)
	local totalDamage = 0

	for _, target in ipairs(targets) do
		local dealt = 0
		if target.kind == "dummy" then
			dealt = applyDamageToDummy(attacker, target.dummy, amount)
		elseif target.kind == "bot" then
			dealt = BotService.ApplyDamage(target.bot, amount)
		elseif target.kind == "player" then
			dealt = applyDamageToPlayer(attacker, target.player, amount, forward * (knockbackScale or 20))
		end
		totalDamage += dealt

		if target.position then
			spawnHitVisual(target.position + Vector3.new(0, 2, 0), Color3.fromRGB(255, 215, 80), 3, 0.2)
			fireFeedback(attacker, {
				kind = "dealtDamage",
				amount = dealt,
				position = target.position,
			})
		end
	end

	return totalDamage
end

local function pullTargetToward(origin, target, strength)
	local body = nil
	if target.kind == "player" then
		body = getRoot(target.player)
	elseif target.kind == "bot" then
		body = BotService.GetBody(target.bot)
	elseif target.kind == "dummy" then
		body = getDummyBody(target.dummy)
	end

	if not body or body.Anchored then
		return
	end

	local direction = origin - body.Position
	if direction.Magnitude > 0.1 then
		body.AssemblyLinearVelocity += direction.Unit * strength
	end
end

local function markTarget(target, duration)
	if target.kind == "player" then
		local root = getRoot(target.player)
		target.player:SetAttribute("LightMarked", true)
		setMarkedVisual(target.player.Character or target.player, root, duration)
		task.delay(duration, function()
			if target.player.Parent then
				target.player:SetAttribute("LightMarked", false)
			end
		end)
	elseif target.kind == "bot" then
		local body = BotService.GetBody(target.bot)
		BotService.Mark(target.bot, duration)
		setMarkedVisual(target.bot.model, body, duration)
	elseif target.kind == "dummy" then
		local body = getDummyBody(target.dummy)
		target.dummy:SetAttribute("LightMarked", true)
		setMarkedVisual(target.dummy, body, duration)
		task.delay(duration, function()
			if target.dummy.Parent then
				target.dummy:SetAttribute("LightMarked", false)
			end
		end)
	end
end

local function slowTarget(target, multiplier, duration)
	if target.kind == "player" then
		CharacterService.SetSlow(target.player, multiplier, duration)
	elseif target.kind == "bot" then
		BotService.SetSlow(target.bot, multiplier, duration)
	elseif target.kind == "dummy" then
		target.dummy:SetAttribute("Slowed", true)
		task.delay(duration, function()
			if target.dummy.Parent then
				target.dummy:SetAttribute("Slowed", false)
			end
		end)
	end
end

local function collectAllies(attacker, radius)
	local root = getRoot(attacker)
	if not root then
		return {}
	end

	local teamId = TeamService and TeamService.GetPlayerTeam(attacker)
	local allies = {
		{
			kind = "player",
			player = attacker,
			position = root.Position,
			healthRatio = 1,
			distance = 0,
		},
	}

	for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
		if player ~= attacker and isAllyPlayer(attacker, player) then
			local targetRoot = getRoot(player)
			local state = CharacterService.GetState(player)
			if targetRoot and state and not state.defeated then
				local distance = (targetRoot.Position - root.Position).Magnitude
				if distance <= radius then
					table.insert(allies, {
						kind = "player",
						player = player,
						position = targetRoot.Position,
						healthRatio = state.health / math.max(1, state.maxHealth),
						distance = distance,
					})
				end
			end
		end
	end

	if BotService and TeamConstants.isCombatTeam(teamId) then
		for _, bot in ipairs(BotService.GetLivingBots(teamId)) do
			local body = BotService.GetBody(bot)
			if body then
				local distance = (body.Position - root.Position).Magnitude
				if distance <= radius then
					table.insert(allies, {
						kind = "bot",
						bot = bot,
						position = body.Position,
						healthRatio = bot.health / math.max(1, bot.maxHealth),
						distance = distance,
					})
				end
			end
		end
	end

	return allies
end

local function applyShieldToTarget(attacker, target, amount)
	local applied = 0
	if target.kind == "player" then
		applied = CharacterService.AddShield(target.player, amount)
		fireFeedback(target.player, { kind = "allyShielded", amount = applied })
	elseif target.kind == "bot" then
		applied = BotService.AddShield(target.bot, amount)
	end

	if applied > 0 then
		CharacterService.AddUltimateCharge(attacker, 4)
	end
	return applied
end

local function healTarget(attacker, target, amount)
	local applied = 0
	if target.kind == "player" then
		applied = CharacterService.Heal(target.player, amount)
		fireFeedback(target.player, { kind = "allyHealed", amount = applied })
	elseif target.kind == "bot" then
		applied = BotService.Heal(target.bot, amount)
	end

	if applied > 0 then
		CharacterService.AddUltimateCharge(attacker, 4)
	end
	return applied
end

local function runBasic(player, definition)
	local ability = AbilityDefinitions.get(definition.id, "basic")
	if not ability then
		return
	end

	local targets = collectTargets(player, ability.range, ability.radius, true, true)
	local totalDamage = damageTargets(player, targets, ability.damage, definition.id == "atlas_null" and 12 or 24)

	if definition.id == "atlas_null" then
		local root = getRoot(player)
		if root then
			for _, target in ipairs(targets) do
				pullTargetToward(root.Position, target, ability.pullStrength or 0)
			end
		end
	end

	fireFeedback(player, {
		kind = totalDamage > 0 and "hitConfirm" or "ability",
		action = ability.displayName,
		amount = totalDamage,
	})
end

local function runAreaAbility(player, ability, color)
	local root = getRoot(player)
	if not root then
		return 0
	end

	spawnHitVisual(root.Position, color, ability.radius or 12, 0.35)
	local targets = collectTargets(player, ability.radius or 16, ability.radius or 16, false, true)
	return damageTargets(player, targets, ability.damage or 0, 32)
end

local function runKairo(player, actionName, ability)
	local root = getRoot(player)
	if not root then
		return 0
	end

	if actionName == "skill1" then
		root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = root.CFrame.LookVector * 82 + Vector3.new(0, 10, 0)
		spawnHitVisual(root.Position + root.CFrame.LookVector * 8, ability.vfxColor, 5, 0.22)
		return damageTargets(player, collectTargets(player, ability.range, ability.radius, true, true), ability.damage, 50)
	elseif actionName == "skill2" then
		local state = CharacterService.GetState(player)
		if state then
			state.sunburstGuardUntil = os.clock() + (ability.duration or 4)
			state.guard = math.min(state.maxGuard, state.guard + 20)
			CharacterService.SendState(player)
		end
		spawnHitVisual(root.Position, ability.vfxColor, 9, 0.45)
		return 0
	elseif actionName == "skill3" then
		root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = root.CFrame.LookVector * 42 + Vector3.new(0, 64, 0)
		task.delay(0.28, function()
			if player.Parent then
				runAreaAbility(player, ability, ability.vfxColor)
			end
		end)
		return 0
	elseif actionName == "ultimate" then
		return runAreaAbility(player, ability, ability.vfxColor)
	end

	return 0
end

local function runMira(player, actionName, ability)
	local root = getRoot(player)
	if not root then
		return 0
	end

	if actionName == "skill1" then
		spawnHitVisual(root.Position + root.CFrame.LookVector * 15, ability.vfxColor, 4, 0.28)
		return damageTargets(player, collectTargets(player, ability.range, ability.radius, true, true), ability.damage, 30)
	elseif actionName == "skill2" then
		root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = root.CFrame.LookVector * 96 + Vector3.new(0, 18, 0)
		spawnHitVisual(root.Position, ability.vfxColor, 5, 0.2)
		return damageTargets(player, collectTargets(player, ability.range, ability.radius, true, true), ability.damage or 0, 26)
	elseif actionName == "skill3" then
		return runAreaAbility(player, ability, ability.vfxColor)
	elseif actionName == "ultimate" then
		root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = root.CFrame.LookVector * 70 + Vector3.new(0, 32, 0)
		return runAreaAbility(player, ability, ability.vfxColor)
	end

	return 0
end

local function runSora(player, actionName, ability)
	local root = getRoot(player)
	if not root then
		return 0
	end

	if actionName == "skill1" then
		local targets = collectTargets(player, ability.range, ability.radius, true, true)
		for _, target in ipairs(targets) do
			markTarget(target, ability.markDuration or 3)
		end
		fireFeedback(player, { kind = "enemyRevealed", action = ability.displayName })
		return damageTargets(player, targets, ability.damage, 18)
	elseif actionName == "skill2" then
		local allies = collectAllies(player, ability.radius)
		local nonSelfAllies = {}
		for _, ally in ipairs(allies) do
			if ally.player ~= player then
				table.insert(nonSelfAllies, ally)
			end
		end
		table.sort(nonSelfAllies, function(a, b)
			return a.distance < b.distance
		end)
		local target = nonSelfAllies[1] or allies[1]
		if target then
			local applied = applyShieldToTarget(player, target, ability.shield or 0)
			spawnHitVisual(target.position, ability.vfxColor, 8, 0.45, "AR003SoraShield")
			fireFeedback(player, { kind = "allyShielded", action = ability.displayName, amount = applied })
		end
		return 0
	elseif actionName == "skill3" then
		local allies = collectAllies(player, ability.radius)
		table.sort(allies, function(a, b)
			return a.healthRatio < b.healthRatio
		end)
		local target = allies[1]
		if target then
			local healAmount = target.player == player and (ability.selfHeal or 10) or (ability.heal or 18)
			local applied = healTarget(player, target, healAmount)
			spawnHitVisual(target.position, ability.vfxColor, 8, 0.45, "AR003SoraHeal")
			fireFeedback(player, { kind = "allyHealed", action = ability.displayName, amount = applied })
		end
		return 0
	elseif actionName == "ultimate" then
		spawnDisk(root.Position - Vector3.new(0, 2.7, 0), ability.vfxColor, ability.radius or 22, ability.duration or 8, "AR003NovaSanctuary")
		task.spawn(function()
			local finishAt = os.clock() + (ability.duration or 8)
			while player.Parent and os.clock() <= finishAt do
				local allies = collectAllies(player, ability.radius or 22)
				for _, ally in ipairs(allies) do
					healTarget(player, ally, ability.heal or 4)
					applyShieldToTarget(player, ally, ability.shield or 3)
				end
				for _, target in ipairs(collectTargets(player, ability.radius or 22, ability.radius or 22, false, true)) do
					markTarget(target, 1.2)
				end
				task.wait(ability.pulseInterval or 1)
			end
		end)
		return 0
	end

	return 0
end

local function runAtlas(player, actionName, ability)
	local root = getRoot(player)
	if not root then
		return 0
	end

	if actionName == "skill1" then
		local targets = collectTargets(player, ability.range, ability.radius, true, true)
		for _, target in ipairs(targets) do
			pullTargetToward(root.Position, target, ability.pullStrength or 54)
		end
		spawnHitVisual(root.Position + root.CFrame.LookVector * 10, ability.vfxColor, 8, 0.28, "AR003PullPalm")
		fireFeedback(player, { kind = "pulled", action = ability.displayName })
		return damageTargets(player, targets, ability.damage, 8)
	elseif actionName == "skill2" then
		CharacterService.SetDamageReduction(player, ability.damageReduction or 0.35, ability.duration or 5)
		for _, ally in ipairs(collectAllies(player, ability.allyRadius or 14)) do
			if ally.kind == "player" and ally.player ~= player then
				CharacterService.SetDamageReduction(ally.player, ability.allyDamageReduction or 0.15, ability.duration or 5)
			elseif ally.kind == "bot" then
				BotService.SetDamageReduction(ally.bot, ability.allyDamageReduction or 0.15, ability.duration or 5)
			end
		end
		spawnHitVisual(root.Position, ability.vfxColor, 12, 0.55, "AR003OrbitGuard")
		fireFeedback(player, { kind = "damageReduced", action = ability.displayName })
		return 0
	elseif actionName == "skill3" then
		local targets = collectTargets(player, ability.radius, ability.radius, false, true)
		for _, target in ipairs(targets) do
			slowTarget(target, ability.slowMultiplier or 0.55, ability.slowDuration or 3)
		end
		spawnDisk(root.Position - Vector3.new(0, 2.7, 0), ability.vfxColor, ability.radius or 18, 0.55, "AR003HeavyStep")
		fireFeedback(player, { kind = "slowed", action = ability.displayName })
		return damageTargets(player, targets, ability.damage, 12)
	elseif actionName == "ultimate" then
		local center = root.Position + root.CFrame.LookVector * 16
		spawnDisk(center - Vector3.new(0, 2.7, 0), ability.vfxColor, ability.radius or 24, ability.windup or 1.2, "AR003BlackstarWarning")
		task.delay(ability.windup or 1.2, function()
			if not player.Parent then
				return
			end
			local targets = collectTargetsAroundPosition(player, center, ability.radius or 24, true)
			for _, target in ipairs(targets) do
				pullTargetToward(center, target, ability.pullStrength or 24)
			end
			spawnHitVisual(center, ability.vfxColor, ability.radius or 24, 0.5, "AR003BlackstarDrop")
			damageTargets(player, targets, ability.damage or 40, 16)
		end)
		return 0
	end

	return 0
end

local function getCooldownRemaining(player, actionName)
	return CooldownService.GetRemaining(player, actionName)
end

local function reserveAbility(player, actionName, ability)
	local remaining = getCooldownRemaining(player, actionName)
	if remaining > 0.05 then
		fireFeedback(player, { kind = "cooldown", action = actionName, remaining = remaining })
		return false
	end

	if ability.flowCost and not CharacterService.TrySpendFlow(player, ability.flowCost) then
		fireFeedback(player, { kind = "noFlow", action = ability.displayName })
		return false
	end

	CooldownService.TryUse(player, actionName, ability.cooldown or 3)
	return true
end

local function runAbility(player, actionName)
	local state = CharacterService.GetState(player)
	if not state or state.defeated then
		fireFeedback(player, { kind = "defeated", action = actionName })
		return
	end

	local definition = CharacterService.GetDefinition(player)
	if not definition then
		return
	end

	local ability = AbilityDefinitions.get(definition.id, actionName)
	if not ability then
		return
	end

	if not reserveAbility(player, actionName, ability) then
		return
	end

	local totalDamage = 0
	if actionName == GameConstants.Actions.Basic then
		runBasic(player, definition)
		CharacterService.SendState(player, {
			cooldowns = CooldownService.GetSnapshot(player),
		})
		return
	elseif definition.id == "kairo_soljin" then
		totalDamage = runKairo(player, actionName, ability)
	elseif definition.id == "mira_gale" then
		totalDamage = runMira(player, actionName, ability)
	elseif definition.id == "sora_nym" then
		totalDamage = runSora(player, actionName, ability)
	elseif definition.id == "atlas_null" then
		totalDamage = runAtlas(player, actionName, ability)
	end

	CharacterService.SendState(player, {
		cooldowns = CooldownService.GetSnapshot(player),
	})
	fireFeedback(player, {
		kind = actionName == GameConstants.Actions.Ultimate and "ultimate" or "ability",
		action = ability.displayName,
		amount = totalDamage,
	})
end

local function validateCombatRemote(player, actionName)
	if not allowedActions[actionName] then
		return false
	end

	local allowed, _, deniedCount = limiter:Allow(player.UserId)
	if not allowed then
		if deniedCount == 1 or deniedCount % 10 == 0 then
			warn(("[Aniverse Royale] Combat remote spam blocked for %s (%s)."):format(player.Name, actionName))
		end
		fireFeedback(player, { kind = "rateLimited", action = actionName })
		return false
	end

	return true
end

function CombatService.Start(dependencies)
	CharacterService = dependencies.CharacterService
	CooldownService = dependencies.CooldownService
	TeamService = dependencies.TeamService
	BotService = dependencies.BotService
	ArenaRoundService = dependencies.ArenaRoundService

	remotes.CombatAction = ensureRemote(GameConstants.Remotes.CombatAction)
	remotes.CombatFeedback = ensureRemote(GameConstants.Remotes.CombatFeedback)

	remotes.CombatAction.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, actionName)
		actionName = tostring(actionName or "")
		if not validateCombatRemote(player, actionName) then
			return
		end

		if actionName == GameConstants.Actions.BlockBegin then
			if CharacterService.SetBlocking(player, true) then
				fireFeedback(player, { kind = "guarded", action = actionName })
			end
		elseif actionName == GameConstants.Actions.BlockEnd then
			CharacterService.SetBlocking(player, false)
		else
			runAbility(player, actionName)
		end
	end)

	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
		limiter:Clear(player.UserId)
	end)

	refreshDummies()
	fireAll({ kind = "combatReady", action = "AR-003 combat online" })
end

function CombatService.Step()
	return true
end

return CombatService

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
