local MathUtil = require(Shared.Utility.MathUtil)

local MovementValidationService = {}

local CharacterService = nil
local CooldownService = nil
local remotes = {}
local limiter = RateLimiter.new({
	capacity = GameConstants.Movement.RemoteRateLimitCapacity,
	refillPerSecond = GameConstants.Movement.RemoteRateLimitRefill,
})

local allowedActions = {
	[GameConstants.Actions.SprintBegin] = true,
	[GameConstants.Actions.SprintEnd] = true,
	[GameConstants.Actions.Dash] = true,
	[GameConstants.Actions.AirDash] = true,
	[GameConstants.Actions.Slide] = true,
	[GameConstants.Actions.DoubleJump] = true,
	[GameConstants.Actions.WallKick] = true,
}

local function ensureRemote(remoteName)
	local folder = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Remotes")
	if not folder then
		folder = Instance.new("Folder")
		folder.Name = "Remotes"
		folder.Parent = ReplicatedStorage
	end

	local remote = folder:FindFirstChild(remoteName)
	if not remote then
		remote = Instance.new("RemoteEvent")
		remote.Name = remoteName
		remote.Parent = folder
	end

	return remote
end

local function getCharacterParts(player)
	local character = player.Character
	local humanoid = character and character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	local root = character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	return character, humanoid, root
end

local function feedback(player, payload)
	if remotes.CombatFeedback then
		remotes.CombatFeedback:FireClient(player, payload)
	end
end

local function deny(player, actionName, reason, remaining)
	feedback(player, {
		kind = reason,
		action = actionName,
		remaining = remaining,
	})
end

local function validatePlayer(player, actionName)
	if not allowedActions[actionName] then
		return false, "invalid"
	end

	local allowed, _, deniedCount = limiter:Allow(player.UserId)
	if not allowed then
		if deniedCount == 1 or deniedCount % 10 == 0 then
			warn(("[Aniverse Royale] Movement remote spam blocked for %s (%s)."):format(player.Name, actionName))
		end
		return false, "rateLimited"
	end

	local _, humanoid, root = getCharacterParts(player)
	if not humanoid or not root or humanoid.Health <= 0 then
		return false, "noCharacter"
	end

	local worldRoot = workspace:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.RootName)
	local dojo = worldRoot and worldRoot:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.TrainingDojoName)
	local arena = dojo and dojo:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.CombatArenaName)
	local arenaFloor = arena and arena:FindFirstChild("ArenaFloor")

	local arena3v3 = worldRoot and worldRoot:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.World.Arena3v3Name)
	local arena3v3Floor = arena3v3 and arena3v3:FindFirstChild("ArenaFloor")
	local tooFarFromDojo = arenaFloor and (root.Position - arenaFloor.Position).Magnitude > GameConstants.Movement.MaxRemoteDistanceFromDojo
	local tooFarFromArena = arena3v3Floor and (root.Position - arena3v3Floor.Position).Magnitude > GameConstants.Movement.MaxRemoteDistanceFromDojo
	if tooFarFromDojo and (not arena3v3Floor or tooFarFromArena) then
		return false, "tooFar"
	end

	return true, nil, humanoid, root
end

local function spendFlow(player, actionName, amount)
	if amount <= 0 then
		return true
	end

	if not CharacterService.TrySpendFlow(player, amount) then
		deny(player, actionName, "noFlow")
		return false
	end

	return true
end

local function useCooldown(player, actionName, cooldown)
	local ok, remaining = CooldownService.TryUse(player, actionName, cooldown)
	if not ok then
		deny(player, actionName, "cooldown", remaining)
		return false
	end
	return true
end

local function reserveMovement(player, actionName, cooldown, flowCost)
	local remaining = CooldownService.GetRemaining(player, actionName)
	if remaining > 0.05 then
		deny(player, actionName, "cooldown", remaining)
		return false
	end

	if not spendFlow(player, actionName, flowCost or 0) then
		return false
	end

	CooldownService.TryUse(player, actionName, cooldown)
	return true
end

local function moveDirection(humanoid, root)
	local direction = humanoid.MoveDirection
	if direction.Magnitude < 0.1 then
		direction = root.CFrame.LookVector
	end
	return MathUtil.flatUnit(direction, root.CFrame.LookVector)
end

local function handleDash(player, humanoid, root, isAirDash)
	local actionName = isAirDash and GameConstants.Actions.AirDash or GameConstants.Actions.Dash
	local cooldown = isAirDash and GameConstants.Movement.AirDashCooldown or GameConstants.Movement.DashCooldown
	local flowCost = isAirDash and GameConstants.Movement.AirDashFlowCost or GameConstants.Movement.DashFlowCost

	if isAirDash and humanoid.FloorMaterial ~= Enum.Material.Air then
		actionName = GameConstants.Actions.Dash
		cooldown = GameConstants.Movement.DashCooldown
		flowCost = GameConstants.Movement.DashFlowCost
	end

	if not reserveMovement(player, actionName, cooldown, flowCost) then
		return
	end

	local lift = isAirDash and GameConstants.Movement.AirDashLift or 4
	root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = moveDirection(humanoid, root) * GameConstants.Movement.DashSpeed + Vector3.new(0, lift, 0)
	CharacterService.SetMovementState(player, {
		dashing = true,
		lastDashAt = os.clock(),
	})
	feedback(player, {
		kind = "movement",
		action = actionName,
		position = root.Position,
	})
end

local function handleSlide(player, humanoid, root)
	if humanoid.FloorMaterial == Enum.Material.Air then
		deny(player, GameConstants.Actions.Slide, "invalid")
		return
	end
	if not reserveMovement(player, GameConstants.Actions.Slide, GameConstants.Movement.SlideCooldown, GameConstants.Movement.SlideFlowCost) then
		return
	end

	root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = moveDirection(humanoid, root) * GameConstants.Movement.SlideSpeed + Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
	CharacterService.SetMovementState(player, {
		sliding = true,
		lastSlideAt = os.clock(),
	})
	feedback(player, {
		kind = "movement",
		action = GameConstants.Actions.Slide,
		position = root.Position,
	})
end

local function handleDoubleJump(player, humanoid, root)
	if humanoid.FloorMaterial ~= Enum.Material.Air then
		return
	end
	if not useCooldown(player, GameConstants.Actions.DoubleJump, GameConstants.Movement.DoubleJumpCooldown) then
		return
	end

	root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.new(root.AssemblyLinearVelocity.X, GameConstants.Movement.DoubleJumpPower, root.AssemblyLinearVelocity.Z)
	CharacterService.SetMovementState(player, {
		doubleJumped = true,
		lastDoubleJumpAt = os.clock(),
	})
	feedback(player, {
		kind = "movement",
		action = GameConstants.Actions.DoubleJump,
		position = root.Position,
	})
end

local function handleWallKick(player, humanoid, root, normal)
	if humanoid.FloorMaterial ~= Enum.Material.Air then
		return
	end
	if typeof(normal) ~= "Vector3" or normal.Magnitude < 0.1 then
		normal = -root.CFrame.LookVector
	end
	if not useCooldown(player, GameConstants.Actions.WallKick, GameConstants.Movement.WallKickCooldown) then
		return
	end

	local kick = MathUtil.flatUnit(normal, -root.CFrame.LookVector)
	root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = kick * GameConstants.Movement.WallKickHorizontalPower + Vector3.new(0, GameConstants.Movement.WallKickVerticalPower, 0)
	CharacterService.SetMovementState(player, {
		lastWallKickAt = os.clock(),
	})
	feedback(player, {
		kind = "movement",
		action = GameConstants.Actions.WallKick,
		position = root.Position,
	})
end

local function handleMovement(player, actionName, payload)
	actionName = tostring(actionName or "")
	local ok, reason, humanoid, root = validatePlayer(player, actionName)
	if not ok then
		deny(player, actionName, reason)
		return
	end

	if actionName == GameConstants.Actions.SprintBegin then
		CharacterService.SetSprinting(player, true)
		feedback(player, { kind = "movement", action = actionName })
	elseif actionName == GameConstants.Actions.SprintEnd then
		CharacterService.SetSprinting(player, false)
	elseif actionName == GameConstants.Actions.Dash then
		handleDash(player, humanoid, root, false)
	elseif actionName == GameConstants.Actions.AirDash then
		handleDash(player, humanoid, root, true)
	elseif actionName == GameConstants.Actions.Slide then
		handleSlide(player, humanoid, root)
	elseif actionName == GameConstants.Actions.DoubleJump then
		handleDoubleJump(player, humanoid, root)
	elseif actionName == GameConstants.Actions.WallKick then
		local normal = type(payload) == "table" and payload.normal
		handleWallKick(player, humanoid, root, normal)
	end
end

function MovementValidationService.Start(dependencies)
	CharacterService = dependencies.CharacterService
	CooldownService = dependencies.CooldownService

	remotes.MovementAction = ensureRemote(GameConstants.Remotes.MovementAction)
	remotes.CombatFeedback = ensureRemote(GameConstants.Remotes.CombatFeedback)

	remotes.MovementAction.OnServerEvent:Connect(handleMovement)

	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
		limiter:Clear(player.UserId)
	end)
end

return MovementValidationService

local CooldownService = {}

local cooldownsByUserId = {}

local function getBucket(player)
	local userId = player.UserId
	local bucket = cooldownsByUserId[userId]
	if not bucket then
		bucket = {}
		cooldownsByUserId[userId] = bucket
	end
	return bucket
end

function CooldownService.Start()
	return true
end

function CooldownService.TryUse(player, key, duration)
	local now = os.clock()
	local bucket = getBucket(player)
	local readyAt = bucket[key] or 0

	if readyAt > now then
		return false, readyAt - now
	end

	bucket[key] = now + duration
	return true, duration
end

function CooldownService.GetRemaining(player, key)
	local bucket = getBucket(player)
	return math.max(0, (bucket[key] or 0) - os.clock())
end

function CooldownService.GetSnapshot(player)
	local now = os.clock()
	local snapshot = {}
	local bucket = getBucket(player)

	for key, readyAt in pairs(bucket) do
		snapshot[key] = math.max(0, readyAt - now)
	end

	return snapshot
end

function CooldownService.ClearPlayer(player)
	cooldownsByUserId[player.UserId] = nil
end

function CooldownService.ResetPlayer(player)
	CooldownService.ClearPlayer(player)
end

return CooldownService

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")

local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local GameConstants = require(Shared.Config.GameConstants)
local InputBindings = require(Shared.Config.InputBindings)
local MathUtil = require(Shared.Utility.MathUtil)

local CameraController = require(script.Parent.CameraController)

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local movementAction = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes"):WaitForChild(GameConstants.Remotes.MovementAction)
local stateUpdate = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes"):WaitForChild(GameConstants.Remotes.StateUpdate)

local MovementController = {}

local latestStats = nil
local doubleJumpUsed = false
local lastDashAt = 0
local lastSlideAt = 0

local function getCharacterParts()
	local character = player.Character
	local humanoid = character and character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	local root = character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	return character, humanoid, root
end

local function canSpend(amount)
	return not latestStats or not latestStats.flow or latestStats.flow >= amount
end

local function getDashDirection(humanoid, root)
	local camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera
	local direction = humanoid and humanoid.MoveDirection or Vector3.zero
	if direction.Magnitude < 0.1 and camera then
		direction = Vector3.new(camera.CFrame.LookVector.X, 0, camera.CFrame.LookVector.Z)
	end
	if direction.Magnitude < 0.1 and root then
		direction = root.CFrame.LookVector
	end
	return MathUtil.flatUnit(direction, Vector3.new(0, 0, -1))
end

local function applyLocalDash(isAirDash)
	local _, humanoid, root = getCharacterParts()
	if not humanoid or not root then
		return
	end

	local now = os.clock()
	if now - lastDashAt < 0.18 then
		return
	end
	lastDashAt = now

	local cost = isAirDash and GameConstants.Movement.AirDashFlowCost or GameConstants.Movement.DashFlowCost
	if not canSpend(cost) then
		movementAction:FireServer(isAirDash and GameConstants.Actions.AirDash or GameConstants.Actions.Dash)
		return
	end

	local direction = getDashDirection(humanoid, root)
	root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = direction * GameConstants.Movement.DashSpeed + Vector3.new(0, isAirDash and GameConstants.Movement.AirDashLift or 4, 0)
	movementAction:FireServer(isAirDash and GameConstants.Actions.AirDash or GameConstants.Actions.Dash)
	CameraController.PulseDash()
end

local function applyLocalSlide()
	local _, humanoid, root = getCharacterParts()
	if not humanoid or not root then
		return
	end

	local now = os.clock()
	if now - lastSlideAt < 0.25 then
		return
	end
	lastSlideAt = now

	if humanoid.FloorMaterial ~= Enum.Material.Air and canSpend(GameConstants.Movement.SlideFlowCost) then
		root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = getDashDirection(humanoid, root) * GameConstants.Movement.SlideSpeed + Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
	end

	movementAction:FireServer(GameConstants.Actions.Slide)
end

local function raycastWall(root)
	local params = RaycastParams.new()
	params.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Exclude
	params.FilterDescendantsInstances = { player.Character }

	local directions = {
		root.CFrame.RightVector,
		-root.CFrame.RightVector,
		root.CFrame.LookVector,
		-root.CFrame.LookVector,
	}

	for _, direction in ipairs(directions) do
		local result = Workspace:Raycast(root.Position, direction * 4.25, params)
		if result and result.Instance and result.Instance.CanCollide then
			return result
		end
	end

	return nil
end

local function tryWallKick(humanoid, root)
	local result = raycastWall(root)
	if not result then
		return false
	end

	local normal = result.Normal
	local kick = MathUtil.flatUnit(normal, -root.CFrame.LookVector)
	root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = kick * GameConstants.Movement.WallKickHorizontalPower + Vector3.new(0, GameConstants.Movement.WallKickVerticalPower, 0)
	movementAction:FireServer(GameConstants.Actions.WallKick, {
		normal = normal,
	})
	CameraController.ShakeSmall()
	return true
end

local function bindCharacter(character)
	doubleJumpUsed = false
	local humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid", 10)
	if not humanoid then
		return
	end

	humanoid.StateChanged:Connect(function(_, newState)
		if newState == Enum.HumanoidStateType.Landed or newState == Enum.HumanoidStateType.Running then
			doubleJumpUsed = false
		end
	end)
end

local function getRootGui()
	local playerGui = player:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")
	local hud = playerGui and playerGui:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.HudName)
	return hud and hud:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.RootName)
end

local function getHotbarButton(buttonName)
	local root = getRootGui()
	local hotbar = root and root:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.AbilityHotbarName)
	return hotbar and hotbar:FindFirstChild(buttonName)
end

local function bindHotbarMovementButton(buttonName, callback)
	local button = getHotbarButton(buttonName)
	if button and button:IsA("TextButton") then
		button.Activated:Connect(callback)
	end
end

function MovementController.Start()
	stateUpdate.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(payload)
		latestStats = payload and payload.stats or latestStats
	end)

	UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gameProcessed)
		if gameProcessed then
			return
		end

		local _, humanoid = getCharacterParts()
		if input.KeyCode == InputBindings.Keyboard.Sprint then
			if humanoid then
				humanoid.WalkSpeed = GameConstants.Movement.BaseSprintSpeed
			end
			movementAction:FireServer(GameConstants.Actions.SprintBegin)
			CameraController.PulseSprint(true)
		elseif input.KeyCode == InputBindings.Keyboard.Dash then
			local isAirDash = humanoid and humanoid.FloorMaterial == Enum.Material.Air
			applyLocalDash(isAirDash)
		elseif input.KeyCode == InputBindings.Keyboard.Slide then
			applyLocalSlide()
		end
	end)

	UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
		if input.KeyCode == InputBindings.Keyboard.Sprint then
			local _, humanoid = getCharacterParts()
			if humanoid then
				humanoid.WalkSpeed = GameConstants.Movement.BaseWalkSpeed
			end
			movementAction:FireServer(GameConstants.Actions.SprintEnd)
			CameraController.PulseSprint(false)
		end
	end)

	UserInputService.JumpRequest:Connect(function()
		local _, humanoid, root = getCharacterParts()
		if not humanoid or not root then
			return
		end

		if humanoid.FloorMaterial == Enum.Material.Air then
			if not doubleJumpUsed then
				doubleJumpUsed = true
				root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.new(root.AssemblyLinearVelocity.X, GameConstants.Movement.DoubleJumpPower, root.AssemblyLinearVelocity.Z)
				movementAction:FireServer(GameConstants.Actions.DoubleJump)
				CameraController.ShakeSmall()
			else
				tryWallKick(humanoid, root)
			end
		end
	end)

	player.CharacterAdded:Connect(bindCharacter)
	if player.Character then
		bindCharacter(player.Character)
	end

	task.spawn(function()
		local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
		playerGui:WaitForChild(GameConstants.UI.HudName, 10)
		bindHotbarMovementButton("DashButton", function()
			local _, humanoid = getCharacterParts()
			local isAirDash = humanoid and humanoid.FloorMaterial == Enum.Material.Air
			applyLocalDash(isAirDash)
		end)
		bindHotbarMovementButton("SlideButton", applyLocalSlide)
	end)
end

return MovementController

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer

local CameraController = {}

local defaultFov = 70
local sprinting = false
local pulseOffset = 0
local shakeUntil = 0
local shakeIntensity = 0
local activeTween = nil

local function currentCamera()
	return Workspace.CurrentCamera
end

local function tweenFov(targetFov, duration)
	local camera = currentCamera()
	if not camera then
		return
	end

	if activeTween then
		activeTween:Cancel()
	end

	activeTween = TweenService:Create(camera, TweenInfo.new(duration or 0.16, Enum.EasingStyle.Sine, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {
		FieldOfView = targetFov,
	})
	activeTween:Play()
end

local function settleFov()
	tweenFov(defaultFov + (sprinting and 4 or 0), 0.22)
end

local function shake(duration, intensity)
	shakeUntil = math.max(shakeUntil, os.clock() + duration)
	shakeIntensity = math.max(shakeIntensity, intensity)
end

local function setupCamera()
	local camera = currentCamera()
	if not camera then
		return
	end

	camera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Custom
	defaultFov = camera.FieldOfView
	settleFov()
end

function CameraController.Start()
	setupCamera()

	player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
		task.wait(0.2)
		setupCamera()
	end)

	RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
		local camera = currentCamera()
		if not camera then
			return
		end

		if pulseOffset > 0 then
			pulseOffset = math.max(0, pulseOffset - 0.08)
			camera.FieldOfView = math.max(camera.FieldOfView, defaultFov + pulseOffset)
		end

		if os.clock() < shakeUntil then
			local intensity = shakeIntensity
			local offset = Vector3.new(
				(math.random() - 0.5) * intensity,
				(math.random() - 0.5) * intensity,
				0
			)
			camera.CFrame = camera.CFrame * CFrame.new(offset)
			shakeIntensity = math.max(0, shakeIntensity * 0.92)
		else
			shakeIntensity = 0
		end
	end)
end

function CameraController.PulseDash()
	pulseOffset = 5
	tweenFov(defaultFov + 7, 0.1)
	task.delay(0.12, settleFov)
	CameraController.ShakeSmall()
end

function CameraController.PulseSprint(active)
	sprinting = active == true
	settleFov()
end

function CameraController.ShakeSmall()
	shake(0.12, 0.12)
end

function CameraController.ShakeMedium()
	shake(0.2, 0.24)
end

function CameraController.HitConfirm()
	pulseOffset = 3
	CameraController.ShakeSmall()
end

function CameraController.UltimatePulse()
	pulseOffset = 10
	tweenFov(defaultFov + 11, 0.12)
	task.delay(0.2, settleFov)
	CameraController.ShakeMedium()
end

function CameraController.SoftLockPlaceholder()
	return nil
end

return CameraController

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")

local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local GameConstants = require(Shared.Config.GameConstants)
local InputBindings = require(Shared.Config.InputBindings)
local UIConstants = require(Shared.Config.UIConstants)
local AbilityDefinitions = require(Shared.Config.AbilityDefinitions)
local MathUtil = require(Shared.Utility.MathUtil)

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local remotes = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes")
local stateUpdate = remotes:WaitForChild(GameConstants.Remotes.StateUpdate)
local combatFeedback = remotes:WaitForChild(GameConstants.Remotes.CombatFeedback)

local HUDController = {}

local latestPayload = nil
local cooldowns = {}
local feedbackExpiresAt = 0
local debugVisible = false

local function getRoot()
	local playerGui = player:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")
	local hud = playerGui and playerGui:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.HudName)
	return hud and hud:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.RootName)
end

local function findChild(root, path)
	local current = root
	for segment in string.gmatch(path, "[^.]+") do
		current = current and current:FindFirstChild(segment)
	end
	return current
end

local function setText(root, path, text)
	local current = findChild(root, path)
	if current and (current:IsA("TextLabel") or current:IsA("TextButton")) then
		current.Text = text
	end
end

local function setVisible(root, path, visible)
	local current = findChild(root, path)
	if current and current:IsA("GuiObject") then
		current.Visible = visible
	end
end

local function panel(root, primary, fallback)
	return root:FindFirstChild(primary) or (fallback and root:FindFirstChild(fallback))
end

local function setBar(root, name, value, maxValue)
	local bars = panel(root, GameConstants.UI.BottomBarsName, "Bars")
	local bar = bars and bars:FindFirstChild(name)
	if not bar then
		return
	end

	local fill = bar:FindFirstChild("Fill")
	local label = bar:FindFirstChild("Label")
	local ratio = MathUtil.ratio(value, maxValue)

	if fill and fill:IsA("Frame") then
		fill.Size = UDim2.fromScale(ratio, 1)
	end

	if label and label:IsA("TextLabel") then
		label.Text = name .. " " .. tostring(math.floor(value or 0)) .. "/" .. tostring(math.floor(maxValue or 0))
	end
end

local function setButtonText(button, mainText, keyText)
	local label = button:FindFirstChild("Label")
	local keyLabel = button:FindFirstChild("KeyLabel")
	if label and label:IsA("TextLabel") then
		label.Text = mainText
	elseif button:IsA("TextButton") then
		button.Text = mainText .. (keyText and ("\n" .. keyText) or "")
	end

	if keyLabel and keyLabel:IsA("TextLabel") then
		keyLabel.Text = keyText or ""
	end
end

local function getHotbarButton(root, buttonName)
	local hotbar = panel(root, GameConstants.UI.AbilityHotbarName, "Abilities")
	return hotbar and hotbar:FindFirstChild(buttonName)
end

local function setCooldownVisual(button, remaining)
	local cooldownText = button:FindFirstChild("CooldownText") or button:FindFirstChild("Cooldown")
	local overlay = button:FindFirstChild("CooldownOverlay")
	if remaining > 0.05 then
		if cooldownText and cooldownText:IsA("TextLabel") then
			cooldownText.Text = string.format("%.1f", remaining)
		end
		if overlay and overlay:IsA("GuiObject") then
			overlay.Visible = true
		end
	else
		if cooldownText and cooldownText:IsA("TextLabel") then
			cooldownText.Text = ""
		end
		if overlay and overlay:IsA("GuiObject") then
			overlay.Visible = false
		end
	end
end

local function setNoFlowVisual(button, visible)
	local overlay = button:FindFirstChild("NoFlowOverlay")
	if overlay and overlay:IsA("GuiObject") then
		overlay.Visible = visible
	end
end

local function setAbilityButton(root, actionKey)
	local binding = InputBindings.getAction(actionKey)
	if not binding then
		return
	end

	local button = getHotbarButton(root, binding.buttonName)
	if not button or not button:IsA("TextButton") then
		return
	end

	local character = latestPayload and latestPayload.character
	local stats = latestPayload and latestPayload.stats
	local actionName = binding.remote
	local abilityName = binding.label
	local noFlow = false

	if character and character.abilities and character.abilities[actionName] then
		abilityName = character.abilities[actionName]
	end

	local ability = character and AbilityDefinitions.get(character.id, actionName)
	if ability and ability.flowCost and stats then
		noFlow = (stats.flow or 0) < ability.flowCost
	end

	setButtonText(button, abilityName, binding.keyText)
	setCooldownVisual(button, cooldowns[actionName] or 0)
	setNoFlowVisual(button, noFlow)

	if button.BackgroundColor3 and (cooldowns[actionName] or 0) <= 0.05 and not noFlow then
		local readyStroke = button:FindFirstChild("ReadyStroke")
		if readyStroke and readyStroke:IsA("UIStroke") then
			readyStroke.Color = UIConstants.Colors.Ready
			readyStroke.Transparency = 0.2
		end
	elseif button.BackgroundColor3 then
		local readyStroke = button:FindFirstChild("ReadyStroke")
		if readyStroke and readyStroke:IsA("UIStroke") then
			readyStroke.Transparency = 0.75
		end
	end
end

local function setFeedback(root, message)
	setText(root, GameConstants.UI.FeedbackLayerName .. ".StatusText", message)
	setText(root, "Feedback", message)
end

local function renderDebug(root)
	local debugPanel = root:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.DebugPanelName)
	if not debugPanel or not debugPanel:IsA("GuiObject") then
		return
	end

	debugPanel.Visible = debugVisible
	if not debugVisible then
		return
	end

	local stats = latestPayload and latestPayload.stats
	local movement = latestPayload and latestPayload.movement
	local text = debugPanel:FindFirstChild("Text")
	if text and text:IsA("TextLabel") then
		text.Text = string.format(
			"AR-003 DEBUG\nFlow %d | Guard %d\nSprint %s | Dash %s | Slide %s",
			math.floor(stats and stats.flow or 0),
			math.floor(stats and stats.guard or 0),
			tostring(movement and movement.sprinting or false),
			tostring(movement and movement.dashing or false),
			tostring(movement and movement.sliding or false)
		)
	end
end

local function render()
	local root = getRoot()
	if not root or not latestPayload then
		return
	end

	local character = latestPayload.character
	local stats = latestPayload.stats
	if character then
		setText(root, GameConstants.UI.TopBarName .. ".CharacterName", character.displayName .. " - " .. character.subtitle)
		setText(root, GameConstants.UI.TopBarName .. ".RoleName", character.role .. " | Aura: " .. character.aura)
		setText(root, "Top.CharacterName", character.displayName .. " - " .. character.subtitle)
		setText(root, "Top.RoleName", character.role .. " | Aura: " .. character.aura)
		setText(root, GameConstants.UI.CharacterPanelName .. ".SelectedName", character.displayName)
		setText(root, GameConstants.UI.CharacterPanelName .. ".SelectedRole", character.role .. " | Aura: " .. character.aura)
	end

	if stats then
		setBar(root, "Health", stats.health, stats.maxHealth)
		setBar(root, "Shield", stats.shield, stats.maxShield)
		setBar(root, "Flow", stats.flow, stats.maxFlow)
		setBar(root, "Guard", stats.guard, stats.maxGuard)
	end

	for _, actionKey in ipairs(InputBindings.listHotbarOrder()) do
		setAbilityButton(root, actionKey)
	end

	if latestPayload.error then
		setFeedback(root, tostring(latestPayload.error))
		feedbackExpiresAt = os.clock() + 1.4
	elseif os.clock() > feedbackExpiresAt then
		setFeedback(root, "")
	end

	renderDebug(root)
end

function HUDController.Start()
	stateUpdate.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(payload)
		latestPayload = payload
		if payload and payload.cooldowns then
			for actionName, remaining in pairs(payload.cooldowns) do
				cooldowns[actionName] = remaining
			end
		end
		render()
	end)

	combatFeedback.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(payload)
		local root = getRoot()
		if not root or not payload then
			return
		end

		local message = payload.kind or "feedback"
		if payload.kind == "selected" and payload.action then
			message = "Selected " .. tostring(payload.action)
		elseif payload.kind == "noFlow" then
			message = UIConstants.Messages.NoFlow
		elseif payload.kind == "cooldown" then
			message = UIConstants.Messages.Cooldown
			if payload.remaining then
				message ..= " " .. string.format("%.1f", payload.remaining)
			end
		elseif payload.kind == "dealtDamage" and payload.amount then
			message = tostring(math.floor(payload.amount)) .. " damage"
		elseif payload.kind == "teamSelected" and payload.action then
			message = "Selected " .. tostring(payload.action)
		elseif payload.kind == "arenaNeedsTeams" then
			message = "Need Sun and Moon combatants"
		elseif payload.kind == "arenaBusy" and payload.action then
			message = "Arena " .. tostring(payload.action)
		elseif payload.kind == "allyShielded" then
			message = "Ally shielded"
		elseif payload.kind == "allyHealed" then
			message = "Ally healed"
		elseif payload.kind == "enemyRevealed" then
			message = "Enemy revealed"
		elseif payload.kind == "pulled" then
			message = "Pulled"
		elseif payload.kind == "slowed" then
			message = "Slowed"
		elseif payload.kind == "damageReduced" then
			message = "Damage reduced"
		elseif payload.action then
			message = tostring(payload.action)
		elseif payload.amount then
			message ..= ": " .. tostring(payload.amount)
		end

		setFeedback(root, message)
		feedbackExpiresAt = os.clock() + 1.4
	end)

	UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gameProcessed)
		if gameProcessed then
			return
		end
		if input.KeyCode == InputBindings.Keyboard.DebugPanel then
			debugVisible = not debugVisible
			render()
		end
	end)

	RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function(deltaTime)
		for actionName, remaining in pairs(cooldowns) do
			cooldowns[actionName] = math.max(0, remaining - deltaTime)
		end
		render()
	end)
end

return HUDController

local Debris = game:GetService("Debris")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")

local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local GameConstants = require(Shared.Config.GameConstants)
local UIConstants = require(Shared.Config.UIConstants)

local CameraController = require(script.Parent.CameraController)

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local combatFeedback = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes"):WaitForChild(GameConstants.Remotes.CombatFeedback)

local FeedbackController = {}

local function getRootPart()
	local character = player.Character
	return character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
end

local function getFeedbackLayer()
	local playerGui = player:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")
	local hud = playerGui and playerGui:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.HudName)
	local root = hud and hud:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.RootName)
	return root and root:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.FeedbackLayerName)
end

local function colorForPayload(payload)
	local action = tostring(payload.action or "")
	if string.find(action, "Wind") or string.find(action, "Gale") or string.find(action, "Tempest") then
		return UIConstants.Colors.Mira
	end
	if string.find(action, "Flame") or string.find(action, "Ember") or string.find(action, "Dawn") or string.find(action, "Meteor") then
		return UIConstants.Colors.Kairo
	end
	if string.find(action, "Star") or string.find(action, "Nova") or string.find(action, "Light") or payload.kind == "allyHealed" then
		return UIConstants.Colors.Sora
	end
	if string.find(action, "Gravity") or string.find(action, "Orbit") or string.find(action, "Blackstar") or payload.kind == "slowed" then
		return UIConstants.Colors.Atlas
	end
	if payload.kind == "noFlow" then
		return UIConstants.Colors.NoFlow
	end
	return UIConstants.Colors.Cooldown
end

local function spawnDamageNumber(payload)
	local layer = getFeedbackLayer()
	if not layer then
		return
	end

	local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	label.Name = "FloatingDamage"
	label.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	label.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBlack
	label.TextScaled = true
	label.TextColor3 = colorForPayload(payload)
	label.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.25
	label.Text = tostring(math.floor(payload.amount or 0))
	label.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.08, 0.045)
	label.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5 + (math.random() - 0.5) * 0.08, 0.45 + (math.random() - 0.5) * 0.06)
	label.Parent = layer

	local targetPosition = UDim2.fromScale(label.Position.X.Scale, label.Position.Y.Scale - 0.08)
	TweenService:Create(label, TweenInfo.new(0.65, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {
		Position = targetPosition,
		TextTransparency = 1,
		TextStrokeTransparency = 1,
	}):Play()
	Debris:AddItem(label, 0.75)
end

local function pulseHitMarker()
	local layer = getFeedbackLayer()
	local marker = layer and layer:FindFirstChild("HitMarker")
	if not marker or not marker:IsA("GuiObject") then
		return
	end

	marker.Visible = true
	marker.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.035, 0.035)
	if marker:IsA("Frame") then
		marker.BackgroundTransparency = 0.1
	end

	local tween = TweenService:Create(marker, TweenInfo.new(0.18, Enum.EasingStyle.Sine, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {
		Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.052, 0.052),
	})
	tween:Play()
	task.delay(0.2, function()
		if marker.Parent then
			marker.Visible = false
		end
	end)
end

local function spawnWorldPulse(position, color, size, duration)
	local part = Instance.new("Part")
	part.Name = "AR002ClientPulse"
	part.Anchored = true
	part.CanCollide = false
	part.CanQuery = false
	part.Shape = Enum.PartType.Ball
	part.Material = Enum.Material.Neon
	part.Transparency = 0.35
	part.Size = Vector3.new(1, 1, 1)
	part.Color = color
	part.Position = position
	part.Parent = Workspace

	TweenService:Create(part, TweenInfo.new(duration or 0.28, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {
		Size = Vector3.new(size, size, size),
		Transparency = 1,
	}):Play()
	Debris:AddItem(part, (duration or 0.28) + 0.08)
end

local function spawnGuardShield()
	local root = getRootPart()
	if not root then
		return
	end

	local shield = Instance.new("Part")
	shield.Name = "AR002GuardShield"
	shield.Anchored = false
	shield.CanCollide = false
	shield.CanQuery = false
	shield.Shape = Enum.PartType.Ball
	shield.Material = Enum.Material.ForceField
	shield.Transparency = 0.45
	shield.Size = Vector3.new(7, 7, 7)
	shield.Color = UIConstants.Colors.Guard
	shield.CFrame = root.CFrame
	shield.Parent = Workspace

	local weld = Instance.new("WeldConstraint")
	weld.Part0 = root
	weld.Part1 = shield
	weld.Parent = shield

	TweenService:Create(shield, TweenInfo.new(0.28, Enum.EasingStyle.Sine, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {
		Transparency = 1,
		Size = Vector3.new(9, 9, 9),
	}):Play()
	Debris:AddItem(shield, 0.35)
end

local function movementFeedback(actionName, position)
	local root = getRootPart()
	local origin = position or (root and root.Position)
	if not origin then
		return
	end

	if actionName == GameConstants.Actions.Dash or actionName == GameConstants.Actions.AirDash then
		spawnWorldPulse(origin, Color3.fromRGB(255, 160, 70), 7, 0.24)
		CameraController.PulseDash()
	elseif actionName == GameConstants.Actions.DoubleJump then
		spawnWorldPulse(origin - Vector3.new(0, 2.5, 0), Color3.fromRGB(190, 245, 255), 6, 0.25)
		CameraController.ShakeSmall()
	elseif actionName == GameConstants.Actions.Slide then
		spawnWorldPulse(origin - Vector3.new(0, 2.8, 0), Color3.fromRGB(210, 210, 210), 5, 0.2)
	elseif actionName == GameConstants.Actions.WallKick then
		spawnWorldPulse(origin, Color3.fromRGB(180, 240, 255), 5, 0.22)
		CameraController.ShakeSmall()
	elseif actionName == GameConstants.Actions.SprintBegin then
		CameraController.PulseSprint(true)
	elseif actionName == GameConstants.Actions.SprintEnd then
		CameraController.PulseSprint(false)
	end
end

local function handleFeedback(payload)
	if not payload then
		return
	end

	if payload.kind == "dealtDamage" and payload.amount and payload.amount > 0 then
		spawnDamageNumber(payload)
		pulseHitMarker()
		CameraController.HitConfirm()
	elseif payload.kind == "hitConfirm" then
		pulseHitMarker()
		CameraController.HitConfirm()
	elseif payload.kind == "ultimate" then
		CameraController.UltimatePulse()
		local root = getRootPart()
		if root then
			spawnWorldPulse(root.Position, colorForPayload(payload), 18, 0.45)
		end
	elseif payload.kind == "movement" then
		movementFeedback(payload.action, payload.position)
	elseif payload.kind == "guarded" then
		spawnGuardShield()
	elseif payload.kind == "blockBreak" then
		CameraController.ShakeMedium()
	end
end

function FeedbackController.Start()
	combatFeedback.OnClientEvent:Connect(handleFeedback)
end

return FeedbackController

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local GameConstants = require(Shared.Config.GameConstants)
local CharacterDefinitions = require(Shared.Config.CharacterDefinitions)

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local requestCharacterChange = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes"):WaitForChild(GameConstants.Remotes.RequestCharacterChange)

local CharacterSelectController = {}

local boundButtons = {}

local function getPanel()
	local playerGui = player:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")
	local hud = playerGui and playerGui:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.HudName)
	local root = hud and hud:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.RootName)
	return root and (root:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.CharacterPanelName) or root:FindFirstChild("CharacterSelect"))
end

local function bindButton(button, characterId)
	if not button or not button:IsA("TextButton") or boundButtons[button] then
		return
	end

	if not CharacterDefinitions.exists(characterId) then
		return
	end

	boundButtons[button] = true
	button.Activated:Connect(function()
		requestCharacterChange:FireServer(characterId)
	end)
end

local function bindNamedButton(panel, buttonName, characterId)
	bindButton(panel and panel:FindFirstChild(buttonName, true), characterId)
end

local function bindPanel()
	local panel = getPanel()
	if not panel then
		return
	end

	for _, descendant in ipairs(panel:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("TextButton") then
			local characterId = descendant:GetAttribute("CharacterId")
			if characterId then
				bindButton(descendant, tostring(characterId))
			end
		end
	end

	bindNamedButton(panel, "KairoButton", "kairo_soljin")
	bindNamedButton(panel, "MiraButton", "mira_gale")
	bindNamedButton(panel, "SoraButton", "sora_nym")
	bindNamedButton(panel, "AtlasButton", "atlas_null")
	bindNamedButton(panel, "KairoCard", "kairo_soljin")
	bindNamedButton(panel, "MiraCard", "mira_gale")
	bindNamedButton(panel, "SoraCard", "sora_nym")
	bindNamedButton(panel, "AtlasCard", "atlas_null")
end

function CharacterSelectController.Start()
	task.spawn(function()
		local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
		playerGui:WaitForChild(GameConstants.UI.HudName, 10)
		bindPanel()

		local panel = getPanel()
		if panel then
			panel.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
				if descendant:IsA("TextButton") then
					local characterId = descendant:GetAttribute("CharacterId")
					if characterId then
						bindButton(descendant, tostring(characterId))
					end
				end
			end)
		end
	end)
end

return CharacterSelectController

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")

local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local GameConstants = require(Shared.Config.GameConstants)
local InputBindings = require(Shared.Config.InputBindings)

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local combatAction = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes"):WaitForChild(GameConstants.Remotes.CombatAction)

local CombatController = {}

local blockHeld = false

local function send(actionName)
	combatAction:FireServer(actionName)
end

local function getRoot()
	local playerGui = player:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")
	local hud = playerGui and playerGui:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.HudName)
	return hud and hud:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.RootName)
end

local function findHotbarButton(buttonName)
	local root = getRoot()
	if not root then
		return nil
	end

	local hotbar = root:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.AbilityHotbarName) or root:FindFirstChild("Abilities")
	return hotbar and hotbar:FindFirstChild(buttonName)
end

local function bindButton(buttonName, actionName)
	local button = findHotbarButton(buttonName)
	if button and button:IsA("TextButton") then
		button.Activated:Connect(function()
			if actionName == GameConstants.Actions.BlockBegin then
				blockHeld = not blockHeld
				send(blockHeld and GameConstants.Actions.BlockBegin or GameConstants.Actions.BlockEnd)
			else
				send(actionName)
			end
		end)
	end
end

local function bindUiButtons()
	bindButton("BasicButton", GameConstants.Actions.Basic)
	bindButton("Skill1Button", GameConstants.Actions.Skill1)
	bindButton("Skill2Button", GameConstants.Actions.Skill2)
	bindButton("Skill3Button", GameConstants.Actions.Skill3)
	bindButton("UltimateButton", GameConstants.Actions.Ultimate)
	bindButton("BlockButton", GameConstants.Actions.BlockBegin)
end

function CombatController.Start()
	UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gameProcessed)
		if gameProcessed then
			return
		end

		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
			send(GameConstants.Actions.Basic)
		elseif input.KeyCode == InputBindings.Keyboard.Skill1 then
			send(GameConstants.Actions.Skill1)
		elseif input.KeyCode == InputBindings.Keyboard.Skill2 then
			send(GameConstants.Actions.Skill2)
		elseif input.KeyCode == InputBindings.Keyboard.Skill3 then
			send(GameConstants.Actions.Skill3)
		elseif input.KeyCode == InputBindings.Keyboard.Ultimate then
			send(GameConstants.Actions.Ultimate)
		elseif input.KeyCode == InputBindings.Keyboard.Block then
			blockHeld = true
			send(GameConstants.Actions.BlockBegin)
		end
	end)

	UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input, gameProcessed)
		if gameProcessed then
			return
		end

		if input.KeyCode == InputBindings.Keyboard.Block and blockHeld then
			blockHeld = false
			send(GameConstants.Actions.BlockEnd)
		end
	end)

	task.spawn(function()
		local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
		playerGui:WaitForChild(GameConstants.UI.HudName, 10)
		bindUiButtons()
	end)
end

return CombatController

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")

local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local GameConstants = require(Shared.Config.GameConstants)
local TeamConstants = require(Shared.Config.TeamConstants)

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local remotes = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes")
local requestTeamChange = remotes:WaitForChild(GameConstants.Remotes.RequestTeamChange)
local requestArenaStart = remotes:WaitForChild(GameConstants.Remotes.RequestArenaStart)
local arenaStateUpdate = remotes:WaitForChild(GameConstants.Remotes.ArenaStateUpdate)

local ArenaHUDController = {}

local latestArenaState = nil
local latestAt = 0
local bound = false

local function getPanel()
	local playerGui = player:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")
	local hud = playerGui and playerGui:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.HudName)
	local root = hud and hud:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.RootName)
	return root and root:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.ArenaPanelName)
end

local function setText(panel, name, text)
	local label = panel and panel:FindFirstChild(name, true)
	if label and (label:IsA("TextLabel") or label:IsA("TextButton")) then
		label.Text = text
	end
end

local function bindButton(panel, name, callback)
	local button = panel and panel:FindFirstChild(name, true)
	if button and button:IsA("TextButton") then
		button.Activated:Connect(callback)
	end
end

local function countdownText()
	if not latestArenaState then
		return ""
	end

	local remaining = latestArenaState.countdown or 0
	if remaining > 0 then
		remaining = math.max(0, remaining - (os.clock() - latestAt))
		return string.format("%.1f", remaining)
	end
	return ""
end

local function render()
	local panel = getPanel()
	if not panel or not latestArenaState then
		return
	end

	local scores = latestArenaState.scores or {}
	local living = latestArenaState.living or {}
	setText(panel, "StateText", latestArenaState.state or "Idle")
	setText(panel, "CountdownText", countdownText())
	setText(panel, "RoundText", "Round " .. tostring(latestArenaState.roundNumber or 0))
	setText(panel, "ScoreText", ("Sun %d - Moon %d"):format(scores.sun or 0, scores.moon or 0))
	setText(panel, "LivingText", ("Alive Sun %d | Moon %d"):format(living.sun or 0, living.moon or 0))
	setText(panel, "WinnerText", latestArenaState.winnerName or "")
end

local function bind()
	if bound then
		return
	end

	local panel = getPanel()
	if not panel then
		return
	end

	bound = true
	bindButton(panel, "SunButton", function()
		requestTeamChange:FireServer(TeamConstants.Ids.Sun)
	end)
	bindButton(panel, "MoonButton", function()
		requestTeamChange:FireServer(TeamConstants.Ids.Moon)
	end)
	bindButton(panel, "SpectatorButton", function()
		requestTeamChange:FireServer(TeamConstants.Ids.Spectator)
	end)
	bindButton(panel, "StartButton", function()
		requestArenaStart:FireServer()
	end)
end

function ArenaHUDController.Start()
	task.spawn(function()
		local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
		playerGui:WaitForChild(GameConstants.UI.HudName, 10)
		bind()
	end)

	arenaStateUpdate.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(payload)
		latestArenaState = payload
		latestAt = os.clock()
		render()
	end)

	RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(render)
end

return ArenaHUDController

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local GameConstants = require(Shared.Config.GameConstants)

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local remotes = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes")
local teamStateUpdate = remotes:WaitForChild(GameConstants.Remotes.TeamStateUpdate)
local botStateUpdate = remotes:WaitForChild(GameConstants.Remotes.BotStateUpdate)
local stateUpdate = remotes:WaitForChild(GameConstants.Remotes.StateUpdate)

local TeamPanelController = {}

local latestTeams = nil
local latestBots = nil
local latestPlayerState = nil

local function getPanel()
	local playerGui = player:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")
	local hud = playerGui and playerGui:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.HudName)
	local root = hud and hud:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.RootName)
	return root and root:FindFirstChild(GameConstants.UI.TeamPanelName)
end

local function setText(panel, name, text)
	local label = panel and panel:FindFirstChild(name, true)
	if label and (label:IsA("TextLabel") or label:IsA("TextButton")) then
		label.Text = text
	end
end

local function teamLine(team)
	if not team then
		return "No players"
	end

	local lines = {}
	for _, item in ipairs(team.players or {}) do
		table.insert(lines, item.displayName or item.name)
	end

	if #lines == 0 then
		table.insert(lines, "No players")
	end

	return table.concat(lines, "\n")
end

local function botLine(teamId)
	if not latestBots or not latestBots.teams or not latestBots.teams[teamId] then
		return "Bots: none"
	end

	local lines = {}
	for _, bot in ipairs(latestBots.teams[teamId]) do
		local state = bot.alive and "alive" or "defeated"
		table.insert(lines, ("%s %d/%d %s"):format(bot.name, math.floor(bot.health), math.floor(bot.maxHealth), state))
	end

	if #lines == 0 then
		table.insert(lines, "Bots: none")
	end

	return table.concat(lines, "\n")
end

local function render()
	local panel = getPanel()
	if not panel then
		return
	end

	local teams = latestTeams and latestTeams.teams or {}
	local currentTeam = latestPlayerState and latestPlayerState.team
	setText(panel, "CurrentTeamText", currentTeam and currentTeam.name or "Spectator")
	setText(panel, "SunList", teamLine(teams.sun) .. "\n" .. botLine("sun"))
	setText(panel, "MoonList", teamLine(teams.moon) .. "\n" .. botLine("moon"))
end

function TeamPanelController.Start()
	teamStateUpdate.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(payload)
		latestTeams = payload
		render()
	end)

	botStateUpdate.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(payload)
		latestBots = payload
		render()
	end)

	stateUpdate.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(payload)
		latestPlayerState = payload
		render()
	end)
end

return TeamPanelController
